name: Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
subject: It all comes down to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Looking at the Left's track record over the last four years, it is safe to say the election this November will be their most desperate and costly attempt to divide our nation and slander President Trump.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42387834&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2&spReportId=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2)
****
****

__**-From the Desk of Marsha Blackburn-**

I'm writing because Republicans have a critical fundraising deadline tomorrow at Midnight, and we're falling short - _it all comes down to this:_**the Left is reporting unprecedented fundraising hauls, fueled by the liberal special interests and dark money PACs who will spend whatever it takes to remove Senate Republicans and President Trump from office.**

We've seen time and again that not only is the Left unfit to lead, but they're also unrepresentative of the American people.

Instead of creating jobs, they launched a partisan and costly investigation aimed at impeaching the president.

Instead of fighting for tax cuts for all Americans, they incited and encouraged violence against Republicans.

Looking at the Left's track record over the last four years, it is safe to say the election this November will be their most desperate and costly attempt to divide our nation and slander President Trump. _**The Democrats have done nothing but throw fits and tantrums because they 've been unable to accept the outcome of the 2016 election.**_

**Senate Republicans have been hard at work fighting for the American people: securing our borders, confirming strict constitutionalist judges, supporting small businesses, protecting the unborn and putting America FIRST.**

We must stand with President Trump to protect the White House and defend the Republican Senate Majority.

With the month of April coming to an end and Election Day drawing closer, we need your help now more than ever to take on the Left and their coffers. I've authorized 3X matching on all contributions to help Republicans get across the finish line \-- [_**make a contribution today and let 's stand together, united in the fight to keep President Trump in the White House and Republicans in the Senate!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc4MzQS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

**[DONATE 3X](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc4MzQS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you for your ongoing support and commitment to helping conservatives in 2020. [**I hope I can count on you to step up and make a 3X-matched contribution to help us chip away at the fundraising deficit.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc4MzQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Sincerely,

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc4MzQS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc4MzQS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Marsha Blackburn
U.S. Senator (R-TN)

__[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc4MzQS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NjE5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Brentwood, TN 37024

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Very bad news at the worst time
body:
with our end-of-month deadline tomorrow, we just got very bad news at the worst time
Peter, Last quarter, Chuck Schumer's handpicked Senate candidates OUTRAISED Republicans across the country. And with our end-of-month deadline tomorrow, we just got very bad news at the worst time:**"_Democrats see Senate suddenly within reach_ " - New York Times**The Democrats' liberal money machine is bringing in MILLIONS and our conservative Senate Majority is now ON THE LINE. To fight back, I've unlocked 4X MATCHING on all donations before tomorrow at MIDNIGHT. [**Can you chip-in?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plykttd-fuutjhhtj-r/)
[DONATE TO CLOSE THE GAP](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plykttd-fuutjhhtj-y/) We can't let the Democrats post another HUGE fundraising report without fighting back. If we lose the Senate, Chuck Schumer will undo all of President Trump's hard-fought conservative victories.**Peter, we have until TOMORROW at midnight to close this gap. **[**Please donate right now.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plykttd-fuutjhhtj-j/) Thank you for your support.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: China Must be Held Accountable
body:
China Must be Held Accountable for the Coronavirus Pandemic No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [China Must be Held Accountable](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-j/)
To date, over 58,000 Americans have lost their lives due to the coronavirus pandemic. In this week's blog, I examine why communist China should be held accountable for the global devastation caused by this virus. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Reopen America Task Force](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog, I discuss why the Paycheck Protection Program ran out of cash, and the reason Democrats are holding up addition funds. I also write about President Trump's new task force and announced guidelines for reopening the economy and our country. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Turning 100 in the Time of the Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-u/)
In this time of the coronavirus, it seems that virtually every news story we see on TV, or read about in the newspapers, is concerning this deadly virus. And rightfully so. I've written about COVID-19 the last five weeks in this blog. Of course while the virus rages, most peoples' lives go on, and this week I wanted to focus on a small group of people among us - those who live for a century. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Helping Small Businesses](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-n/)
The coronavirus crisis has affected all of our lives in so many ways. Palm Sunday was just three days ago, and Easter is just four days ahead. Yet America's churches are all but empty. America's small businesses would normally be busy and thriving, but a significant number of them are shuttered. In this week's blog, I review three pieces of legislation Congress has recently passed to help small businesses, the backbone of our great nation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhlhuk-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Manager@ChristyForCongress.org
subject: Keep the ads up. Get the mail out. Continue the phone calls.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

As we put everything we've got into these final 13 days of our special election, I am spending all my time focused on making sure we have the resources to:
* Keep our ads to CA-25 voters up on television and online
* Send our final batch of mailers to Democratic voters
* Continue our massive remote volunteer operation to ensure voters are returning their ballots

**There's so much left to do -- and I don't want to wake up on May 13th wondering if we did enough to win.** The only way we can keep our efforts up is with support from folks like you.

**[We still need to raise $49,691 before April is over to keep our GOTV efforts going. Please pitch in $5 -- or whatever you can afford right now -- to hit our goal and win this election.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb40/29776869/a4c1d93/569f65ad/2983746668/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom6-full")**

I joined Team Christy because I believe CA-25 deserves a voice and that saving this seat from a GOP takeover is a top priority.

That has only solidified over the last six weeks as we've watched the Trump administration completely fail to lead during this pandemic. We deserve better than calling coronavirus a "hoax," telling states to fend for themselves, and the outrageous suggestion that we inject ourselves with disinfectant.

**But if we lose this seat, it will send a dangerous message of support for Trump's leadership.** Your support is critical to keeping our efforts to stop a GOP takeover going.

**[Let's make sure there's no doubt who people are looking to for leadership in this time. Please pitch in $5 or more to help with our final sprint and win this critical race.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb40/29776869/a4c1d93/569f65ad/2983746668/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom6-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb40/29776869/a4c1d93/569f65ae/2983746668/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom6-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb40/29776869/a4c1d93/569f65af/2983746668/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom6-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Elisa=20Cardnell?=
subject: My Fight Continues.
body:
| | |
---
| | | | **_Be Part of Something Great_**
---
| |
## Dear friend,
##
## **I ran f****or US Congress against Dan Crenshaw because I knew my district needed real leadership from someone who understands the struggles of the average American. As a Navy veteran and teacher, public service is my calling.**

## **When I ended my campaign, I knew my fight to provide representation for working-class families wasn't over. I am proud to have shown that a single mom and teacher could run a grassroots campaign that spoke to the issues that affect us all, like universal healthcare, paid leave, and safe schools. But the hurdles I faced along the way made me appreciate just how far we have to go before we truly have a democracy that is by and for all of us. **

## **That is why I am humbled and excited to join Moms in Office as Executive Director, to continue to empower all moms and strengthen the political voice of all women. Please[join me in supporting](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b11486973d&e=3f151f8b74) other passionate and progressive women candidates.**

## **Thank you for all you do,**

Elisa Cardnell
Executive Director, Moms in Office

**[](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b82d2a87d8&e=3f151f8b74)**
---

| | | |
---|---|---

### Imagine the political landscape if elected seats were filled by qualified, hard-working individuals who truly know first-hand what the majority of Americans endure from day to day—especially moms.

#### Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | Be Part of Something Great | | Dear friend, I ran for US Congress against Dan Crenshaw because I knew my district needed real leadership from someone who understands the struggles of the average American. As a Navy veteran and teacher, public service is my calling. When I ended my campaign, I knew my fight to provide representation for working-class families wasn't over. I am proud to have shown that a single mom and teacher could run a grassroots campaign that spoke to the issues that affect us all, like universal healthcare, paid leave, and safe schools. But the hurdles I faced along the way made me appreciate just how far we have to go before we truly have a democracy that is by and for all of us. That is why I am humbled and excited to join Moms in Office as Executive Director, to continue to empower all moms and strengthen the political voice of all women. Please other passionate and progressive women candidates. Thank you for all you do, Elisa Cardnell Executive Director, Moms in Office | "Chip in" | | | | ---|---|--- | | Imagine the political landscape if elected seats were filled by qualified, hard-working individuals who truly know first-hand what the majority of Americans endure from day to day—especially moms. Will you stand with me? | | | ---|---|--- | | Visit our Website | | | | | | | | | | | www.momsinoffice.org | | | | Copyright © 2020 Moms in Office, All rights reserved.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: day one
body:
Now that the primaries are over, today is DAY ONE of of the general election. That means from this moment, all the way to Election Night on November 3
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend, Now that the primaries are over, today is DAY ONE of of the general election.That means from this moment, all the way to Election Night on November 3, we need to get our message out about delivering results for hardworking Ohio families every day.**We are also facing a massive End of Month deadline. What we do now will set the tone for the rest of this race.****I know times are tough for many, but if you are able, I need your support to beat our fundraising goal and start the general election in a strong position.[Will you chip in anything you can right now?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-y/)** [END OF MONTH FUND](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-j/) [CHIP IN NOW](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-t/) There is no doubt that Nancy Pelosi, AOC and liberal elites on both coasts will be looking at our April fundraising numbers. If we don't reach our goal, they will be emboldened to dump dollars into this district to boost our opponent.On this first day of our general election push, I need you to send Nancy Pelosi, AOC and the liberal elite a clear message to stay out of Ohio.**[I need you to chip in $25 immediately, to help us reach our April goals, and start the general election strong. Can I count on you? ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-i/)**Steve Chabot | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhrht-kujkulhluu-k/)

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Join Our Movement Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| |
# This is more than a campaign, it's a
# movement. Join us today!
Friend, Today is the last day of April, and we need your help to keep our campaign on track. You've heard from our campaign throughout this primary season. In the news, on social media, via tele townhalls, and through emails like this, we've told you about our unique campaign for Auditor General. This weekend, we announced endorsements from community organizations, labor unions and elected officials from across the state and representing Pennsylvanians from every walk of life. This is more than a campaign, it is a movement, and we would like you to join our movement today. **[CLICK HERE to join the movement by making a contribution today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/ngDcFdeBUlVapKqj0XM3z709U-VIMt3g6j_lUXYZaw8=)** I am the best candidate for the office of Auditor General. I will bring my experience as a scientist to this important office and ensure that our government makes decisions that are driven by data. I will hold corporations, organizations and government accountable and ensure that our tax dollars are spent transparently and, more importantly, equitably. I will use the power of this office to make sure that we are building communities and empowering people throughout this great Commonwealth. I can't do that unless I win the Democratic Primary on June 2nd, and to do that I need your help. **[CLICK HERE make a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 or more today. Every contribution helps us reach our goals and keeps our campaign on track going into the Primary.](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/ngDcFdeBUlVapKqj0XM3z709U-VIMt3g6j_lUXYZaw8=)** I am running for Auditor General to be a voice for people, and that is how we are going to win this campaign, with the support of people just like you. I can't rely on big corporate donors. I don't want their money, and they know it. Nevertheless, campaigns for statewide office are expensive and I am counting on the support of people like you to raise the resources we need to win this election and take our movement to Harrisburg. On behalf of my whole campaign team, thank you for your support! [Don't let COVID-19 steal your vote - vote by mail!! Click here to request your ballot today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/TrU9-wkv_i6ZHCiiTNg-GkIYEJlo-Mwd3niKCA5o0Sw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/TrU9-wkv_i6ZHCiiTNg-GkIYEJlo-Mwd3niKCA5o0Sw=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/nvaleF9gY13ftcdSyeAa7Ucnt2oo34zR-osMClV0720=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/ngDcFdeBUlVapKqj0XM3z709U-VIMt3g6j_lUXYZaw8=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/USeGVExph4KVKO1N94RwciZEvzz7ED710lAxSaL1bHQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/UKbZdj8rcXFI9HOYrJCx3bYeqXorQTYLCkw-BD2o2DU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3bPupQOSqIIykF75z2xhXX5-GChZFxR4sPnGgW3DMQ=/-QF4eOEjL5TkV0nc799NjXtCgEKLcyBs46owXdNuHdY=?hl=en)

name: Colin Lauderdale
subject: Before I meet with Charles today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Charles is going to ask me if his email helped us get the surge of donations we needed to reach our goal - and I really want to give him some good news.
It's Colin, Charles' campaign manager.
I wanted to make sure you saw this email from Charles last night where he asked if you could chip in to our campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight.
I'm heading into a meeting with Charles later today about our fundraising numbers. I know he will ask me about his email and if it helped us get the rush of contributions we needed to reach our fundraising goal.
**And I really want to give him some good news. So, I'm forwarding you his email again.**
**[Please, chip in and make a contribution to our campaign right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17318387/190365673/1338497802?refcode=em20200430-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VhYTY0ZS1lNzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amSGrzF-1Y82NZn1kl0IRGekuiC2UkTA3KMvhEDfG-U=)** Any amount makes a big difference. Every gift will count towards helping us reach our goal of 500 grassroots donors, and will help us continue our progressive movement forward.
I'm hoping to share an update on this with Charles in a few hours, so please chip in as soon as you can.
Thanks so much,
Colin
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Charles Booker**
Date: Wed, Apr 29, 2020
Subject: We only need 69 more donors
To: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
Here's what's going on:
Tomorrow at midnight is our campaign's end-of-month fundraising deadline. This month, our goal is to get 500 grassroots donors to pitch in towards our campaign.
As of writing this email, we've got 431 donors. While it'd be awesome to get to 500 donors today, we only need 69 more donors to hit our goal by tomorrow.
**[If you're all in and ready to be one of the 69, chip in now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17318401/190365687/1338497802?refcode=em20200430-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VhYTY0ZS1lNzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amSGrzF-1Y82NZn1kl0IRGekuiC2UkTA3KMvhEDfG-U=)**
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17318402/190365688/1338497802?refcode=em20200430-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VhYTY0ZS1lNzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amSGrzF-1Y82NZn1kl0IRGekuiC2UkTA3KMvhEDfG-U=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17318403/190365689/1338497802?refcode=em20200430-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VhYTY0ZS1lNzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amSGrzF-1Y82NZn1kl0IRGekuiC2UkTA3KMvhEDfG-U=)
I know you've probably gotten emails from our campaign about how important it is to hit this goal, but we're asking because it's so important.
This campaign isn't built on big checks from super PACs and the increasingly out-of-touch Democratic establishment. Not at all.
Building the strongest base of grassroots supporters possible is our number-one way to win this thing — which is why your support at this point is so needed and so crucial.
**[We need at least 69 donors before the end of today to stay on track to meet our fundraising goal of 500 grassroots donors by midnight tomorrow. Can you help us reach this goal and make a contribution of any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17318404/190365690/1338497802?refcode=em20200430-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VhYTY0ZS1lNzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amSGrzF-1Y82NZn1kl0IRGekuiC2UkTA3KMvhEDfG-U=)**
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17318405/190365691/1338497802?refcode=em20200430-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VhYTY0ZS1lNzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amSGrzF-1Y82NZn1kl0IRGekuiC2UkTA3KMvhEDfG-U=)**
I've always said that I'm not the alternative to beat Mitch McConnell, but that we — all of us, together — are.
As we look towards May, we're really going to be turning our focus towards reaching out to and checking in with fellow Kentuckians to build an even stronger support base. So, believe me when I say that your support means the world to me and my team.
Thank you for believing in us and in our vision for a better future.
We got this,
Charles

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Missing your endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Did you see my email asking for your endorsement? We need another 400 conservatives to endorse my campaign in the next 12 hours. Are you in?

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55048302:WflvM8-N5:m:1:2247059263:BC689FB9579A1C64C4FBD922E6AEC794:r)
---

Peter,

Like you, my team and I are having to adapt to the present reality of things, which includes altering campaign related activities, fundraising events, and having our primary election date postponed.

With the absence of campaign rallies, door-knocking, and in-person voter outreach efforts, now more than ever it's important to activate our online support community.

**[That's why today I'm asking you- as one of the most valued members of the American conservative movement - to personally endorse my re-election campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55048302:WflvM8-N5:m:1:2247059263:BC689FB9579A1C64C4FBD922E6AEC794:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55048302:WflvM8-N5:m:1:2247059263:BC689FB9579A1C64C4FBD922E6AEC794:r)
As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election. They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House; and **they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democratic leadership in Congress is more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people**.

So, if you agree with me that:
1. **We need to secure the southern border**
2. **We should defund sanctuary cities**
3. **All life is sacred and should be protected at all costs**

**[Please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55048302:WflvM8-N5:m:1:2247059263:BC689FB9579A1C64C4FBD922E6AEC794:r)**

**[Your endorsement today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55048302:WflvM8-N5:m:1:2247059263:BC689FB9579A1C64C4FBD922E6AEC794:r)** will serve me well as my team and I continue to implement President Trump's America Agenda.

For liberty,
Jim Jordan

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55048302:WflvM8-N5:m:1:2247059263:BC689FB9579A1C64C4FBD922E6AEC794:r)

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 25, 2020.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWflvM8-N5). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWflvM8-N5)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWflvM8-N5) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-60320082389-echo3-DDAA4F646FD30EF6E93AEAB79649DF47@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

[](http://www.campaignsolutions.com)**

In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: A lot’s changed in two months…
body:
Peter,

Two months ago, we were just kicking off the start of petitioning. Our volunteer army was going door-to-door and canvassing subway stops, farmers markets, and busy city sidewalks to get us on the ballot. Those days feel a world away right now, but it just goes to show how much can change in such a short time.

In a little less than two months from today, New York State will be holding a Congressional primary unlike any other in the state’s history, and certainly unlike anything we could have ever seen coming. But even in spite of all these changes, one thing has held true throughout the entire course of this campaign: your commitment to improving the lives of Brooklyn’s working families, and to fighting for the bold, progressive leadership we deserve.

We’re just hours away from our end-of-month deadline, and with all the work that remains to be done, this could be our most important deadline yet. So if you haven’t had the chance to donate yet, or even if you have, will you rush in whatever you can before midnight tonight and help make these final weeks our strongest yet? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab043020
DONATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab043020

Best,
Adem

DONATE https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab043020

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Military Mom for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hej8s28FFpNxmng&b=vZqrBqKxxiyLAmFAyIrQEw

Dear Peter,

I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

I am going to defeat Nancy Pelosi’s “right hand”, her swampy Deputy whip, G.K. Butterfield in this new district - but I need your help urgently to do it!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hej8s28FFpNxmng&b=vZqrBqKxxiyLAmFAyIrQEw

Last year, the courts took a bunch of Republicans out of other districts and put them in this one. It went from a safe Dem district that included the city of Durham, to a swing district with LOTS of Republicans like me, who don’t like being represented by a Socialist Democrat!

I am exactly the type of Republican who can beat Butterfield.

My father was in the military and my family has over 75 years of service to our country! That matters, especially in a district close to several military bases and with many veteran voters!

I am proud of my family, including my son, who attends a prominent military university and graduated high school from a military academy. My daughter is a U.S. Marine! My grandfather served in the Army during WW I, my father served in the Air Force during the Korean War, and my brother-in-law retired as a Marine Gunnery Sergeant after 22 years of distinguished service! Our military all-American family believes in fighting for this country, fighting for America, fighting for our freedom. It is personal with us.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hej8s28FFpNxmng&b=vZqrBqKxxiyLAmFAyIrQEw

I am also a businesswoman and an executive.

I have been a CEO, a division lead with Disney, an international negotiator, and a CFO with several firms... and have started businesses of my own. I am proud of having employed some great people, having met a payroll, and meeting budgets for some pretty good-sized businesses!

I got involved in politics in 2016, when President Trump announced he would run for President.

President Trump spoke to me. I understood his care for this country and its people, and how he wanted to fight for us against those in politics who would lie to us and steal from us. The corrupt. The Swamp.

My support of the president and my conservative platform of protecting our guns, protecting life, securing the border, and reigning in out of control spending was a major reason I won the Republican primary in March.

Conservative Trump voters in my district voted for me with a whopping 77% of the vote! I won more than 30,000 primary votes in this swing district - we are on fire for the President and ready to flip this seat!

Now, I am no Donald Trump - there is only one of him! But I can carry his message to a newly drawn district, full of his voters, and defeat one of the Swampiest Democrats in D.C., G.K. Butterfield - yes Nancy Pelosi’s deputy whip!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hej8s28FFpNxmng&b=vZqrBqKxxiyLAmFAyIrQEw

That’s why I’m running. President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from the socialists. Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!

You need to understand how bad G.K. Butterfield has been - and why he needs to go.

Another Congressman in North Carolina told me a story about Butterfield that sums him up perfectly.

At a joint event that was wrapping up, Butterfield commented that he couldn’t wait to get back to D.C. When asked why he wasn’t returning to his nearby district, he responded that “he just likes it in D.C.”

He hates our district. Constantly refers to us as the “poorest district in America”. Doesn’t like to even be here. He prefers to be in the Swamp- that’s his home now.

Doesn’t that just tell you everything you need to know about this swamp critter? That explains why he votes with Nancy Pelosi nearly 100% of the time. It explains why he voted for impeachment.

Did you know that this man, a leader in his party, called President Trump a "Domestic enemy"??? Look at his own words!

“President Trump put himself before country and violated his oath of office. The oath I took is clear— I have sworn to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic. Based on the evidence before us, I voted in favor of both Articles of Impeachment against Donald J. Trump. No one is above the law.”

My opponent, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, supported impeachment, calling Trump a "domestic enemy"!

That’s why I will beat him in November- with your help.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hej8s28FFpNxmng&b=vZqrBqKxxiyLAmFAyIrQEw

There are many people coming on board with my campaign. I have already been endorsed by Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows. Here is a picture of me and Mark Meadows. Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored!

I am also honored to have been endorsed by the National Association of Gun Rights and Americans for Legal Immigration PAC. They recognize me as being a staunch defender of our Second Amendment rights and opposing open borders!

clean_body: Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am going to defeat Nancy Pelosi’s “right hand”, her swampy Deputy whip, G.K. Butterfield in this new district - but I need your help urgently to do it! Last year, the courts took a bunch of Republicans out of other districts and put them in this one. It went from a safe Dem district that included the city of Durham, to a swing district with LOTS of Republicans like me, who don’t like being represented by a Socialist Democrat! I am exactly the type of Republican who can beat Butterfield. My father was in the military and my family has over 75 years of service to our country! That matters, especially in a district close to several military bases and with many veteran voters! I am proud of my family, including my son, who attends a prominent military university and graduated high school from a military academy. My daughter is a U.S. Marine! My grandfather served in the Army during WW I, my father served in the Air Force during the Korean War, and my brother-in-law retired as a Marine Gunnery Sergeant after 22 years of distinguished service! Our military all-American family believes in fighting for this country, fighting for America, fighting for our freedom. It is personal with us. Image I am also a businesswoman and an executive. I have been a CEO, a division lead with Disney, an international negotiator, and a CFO with several firms... and have started businesses of my own. I am proud of having employed some great people, having met a payroll, and meeting budgets for some pretty good-sized businesses! I got involved in politics in 2016, when President Trump announced he would run for President. President Trump spoke to me. subject: Here's the deal...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
While there's a lot of uncertainty surrounding COVID-19, one thing is for sure: millions of working Americans are struggling to make ends meet.
**That 's why I've been working nonstop to help provide assistance to folks across the country, including the heroes on the frontlines of this crisis.**
So, what exactly have I been up to in the past month?
* I introduced legislation that would cover dependent care costs for the essential workers who are putting their lives on the line to fight coronavirus.

* In a letter to Nancy Pelosi and Kevin McCarthy, I urged the Speaker and Minority Leader to prioritize the mental health of healthcare workers.

* And just last week, I introduced the _Stronger Medicaid Response to the COVID -19 Pandemic Act, _which would expand Medicaid Coverage for COVID-19 testing and treatment to uninsured folks.

**I first ran for Congress back in 2002, because I wanted to better the lives of everyday Americans. That 's my driving force _every single day. _**
However, to keep doing this work, I rely on grassroots support from folks just like you. I know this is a tough time for many folks, but November 2020 is around the corner and there's too much on the line to lose momentum now.
[**So, if you can, will you make a contribution to my re-election campaign so I can keep advocating for the working people of CA-38?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KqoDqDH-IQvdazrZzNhhvUJqpI9BHbo1WPmgbLrN2h8=/PHJpgJku0qtffRikW11A4CPdB1GFMKNOwa5eTtAKRXU=?refcode=X_043020_EOM_C)

body:
|
#
My opponent and special interests spent millions of dollars trying to defeat me in 2018, but I still won because supporters like you stood with me every step of the way. Together, we built an incredible grassroots movement, won our special election for Senate, and showed right-wing outside groups that nothing compares to people-powered campaigns. **I have a good feeling we can do it all again this year.** As you know, I'm running for re-election, and I’m the only Senate Democrat who has to run back-to-back like this. That's why I am relying on you to donate $10 (or more!) toward our end-of-month goal. The deadline is tonight at midnight, which leaves us with very little time to hit our target. But please, only chip in if you can. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can always count on the responses to these emails being really great, and I cannot tell you how grateful I am that you're a member of one of the strongest grassroots teams in the nation. Thank you for all you do. — Tina P.S. I understand this is a difficult time for everyone, so if you’d like to receive fewer emails during this public health emergency, Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

# We Need Your Help Before Midnight
# Tonight.
Earlier today, Nina emailed asking for the help of supporters like you in reaching our end of month goal, and you are coming through. **We are now only $5,246 short of reaching our fundraising goal for April. We can 't thank you enough for your generosity, but _we still need to reach our goal. _** If you haven't already, please make a contribution to support our campaign and help us reach our goal. This is our first full month of fundraising since Elizabeth announced Warren Democrats and her re-election campaign. And it's important we come out of the gate strong and show just how powerful this movement still is.

Hitting these monthly milestones also helps set budgets for advertising, organizing, outreach, and more.

**[If you're able to, can you make a contribution of $2 or whatever you can to help our campaign hit this important fundraising goal before tonight's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257f3/45c30650/1ca636825/66e937ce/2863168494/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyN0ZfRU9NX0dPTF9UXzIwMjAwNDMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ27F_EOM_GOL_T_20200430_V1S2_P")**

If every single person in Pennsylvania reading this email chips in now, we'll reach today's goal and more than make up for what we missed yesterday. But we know not everyone will, and we know not everyone is in a place to make a donation right now.

That's why if you're still able to, it would make a powerful impact. (And if you're not, that is okay!)

**[So if you're able to, will you make your first contribution to help hit our fundraising goal before tonight's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257f3/45c30650/1ca636825/66e937ce/2863168494/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyN0ZfRU9NX0dPTF9UXzIwMjAwNDMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ27F_EOM_GOL_T_20200430_V1S2_P")**

name: Andrew Bourne
subject: Greg needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Hey, it's Andrew, the finance director for Greg's campaign -

**As November approaches, we're all reminded of how important the 2020 election is for our future. We need the help from our supporters more than ever to get Greg's commonsense, good governance message out to voters.**

Greg serves working Arizona families in Congress, _and not big special interests_ , so that's why we are counting on folks like you to power our campaign.

With so much at stake in November, we need to start raising the resources to win now before tonight's monthly deadline at MIDNIGHT.

**[Will you chip in now to help our campaign match our monthly fundraising goal before MIDNIGHT?](https://act.myngp.com/el/gYIkF6zMg4Xbcxr6ewHMnnMG_-IL-MC33mAaD1B7e88=/mXnHVgIAfq5p8KNnRZa0Jt50Wv8KlkkcJ3YTpkY2EOQ=?refcode=X_043020_EOM_C&amount=25)**

name: Jason Yates
subject: How many voters can you equip next Tuesday?
body:
| | Peter, In just a few days, May 5, #GivingTuesdayNow is taking place. This is a nationwide effort to create a wave of citizen engagement to support non-profits that continue to make a difference, despite the negative impacts of COVID-19 to our health, economy, and security. I hope you will include My Faith Votes in your plans. Elections in many states have been postponed, campaign events canceled, and even Congress announced they would not reconvene in D.C., all because of the virus. **Yet, COVID-19 isn’t stopping the November 2020 elections, which are just 187 days away.[Millions of Christians must be equipped and motivated to vote and My Faith Votes needs your help to keep our proven plans moving forward](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200430apl01nd&n=1).** The presidency, 35 seats in the Senate, all 435 seats in the House of Representatives, and over 100,000 local and state offices are at stake. How you’re weathering this pandemic has so much to do with how your elected officials are governing. I believe our nation is at a critical point where there can be a reawakening, and if harnessed correctly, we as Christians can recenter America around the Biblical values upon which she was founded. **[You can make a meaningful difference and equip a Christian voter in a critical battleground state with a gift of $3.20](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200430apl01nd&n=2).** How many voters can you equip? Please plan to donate on May 5 for #GivingTuesdayNow and - for the cost of a cup of coffee - you’ll provide all the resources and tools to activate a voter in November. Or you can get a head start and donate right now. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200430apl01nd&n=3) Thank you for standing with us, Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200430apl01nd&n=4)
---
* * *

Elections in many states have been postponed, campaign events canceled, and even Congress announced they would not reconvene in D.C., all because of the virus. Yet, COVID-19 isn’t stopping the November 2020 elections, which are just 187 days away.. The presidency, 35 seats in the Senate, all 435 seats in the House of Representatives, and over 100,000 local and state offices are at stake. How you’re weathering this pandemic has so much to do with how your elected officials are governing. I believe our nation is at a critical point where there can be a reawakening, and if harnessed correctly, we as Christians can recenter America around the Biblical values upon which she was founded. . How many voters can you equip? Please plan to donate on May 5 for #GivingTuesdayNow and - for the cost of a cup of coffee - you’ll provide all the resources and tools to activate a voter in November. Or you can get a head start and donate right now. Thank you for standing with us, Jason Yates CEO * You subscribed mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below. © 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States

Huge news, folks —
**_National Journal_ just reported that our prospects of taking back the Senate have “changed rapidly” in the last few months, and our grassroots campaign is a big part of the reason why! **
Democrats have surged into the lead in Arizona, Maine, North Carolina, and yes, Colorado — meaning we’re in a very strong position right now to take the Senate back in November.
But with Mitch McConnell and Republican groups booking over $100 million in negative attack ads against Democrats, the polls will shift up and down over the next few weeks — and we have to be ready to fight back.
Democrats have to win this seat to have any chance at taking our government back, and we’re counting on you to step up today:
**Help us fight back one $10 donation at a time. It may not seem like much compared to McConnell’s millions, but it adds up — and if we all do our part, we can elect a Democratic Senate this year: **

clean_body: | BREAKING:National Journal reports Hickenlooper helps put the Senate in play for Democrats Rush a donation of $10 or more before tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to help us flip this Senate seat blue and remove McConnell as Majority Leader in November: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Huge news, folks — National Journal just reported that our prospects of taking back the Senate have “changed rapidly” in the last few months, and our grassroots campaign is a big part of the reason why! Democrats have surged into the lead in Arizona, Maine, North Carolina, and yes, Colorado — meaning we’re in a very strong position right now to take the Senate back in November. But with Mitch McConnell and Republican groups booking over $100 million in negative attack ads against Democrats, the polls will shift up and down over the next few weeks — and we have to be ready to fight back. Democrats have to win this seat to have any chance at taking our government back, and we’re counting on you to step up today: Help us fight back one $10 donation at a time. It may not seem like much compared to McConnell’s millions, but it adds up — and if we all do our part, we can elect a Democratic Senate this year: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for all you do! — Team Hick Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 18886 Denver, CO 80218 United States

name: MJ Hegar Policy Team
subject: Mitch's legislative graveyard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Getting laws passed requires a Senate that'll vote on bills, and that means we need to flip the Senate.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f1/7f51f7bc/4fdaaa1d/4ef17bf7/3385467864/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f1/7f51f7bc/4fdaaa1d/4ef17bf6/3385467864/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200430.1nd__1340__&amount=10")
---
Look, Peter,

Since the beginning of 2019, bills to lower out of control drug prices, to protect voting rights, to protect people with pre-existing conditions, to fight climate change, to protect your pensions -- the list goes on -- have all died in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard.

To make real progress for real people we NEED to flip the Senate, and the path to flipping the Senate runs straight through Texas.

We need MJ in office fighting for us because she'll actually do what's right for Texans, not special interests. To make that happen, we need to hit our goals, and that's going to take our grassroots team (that's you!). **Make a matched donation today, before midnight, to help us hit our end-of-April goal, win the nomination, and take on Sen. Cornyn.**

clean_body: Getting laws passed requires a Senate that'll vote on bills, and that means we need to flip the Senate. | "" | | | "" Look, Peter, Since the beginning of 2019, bills to lower out of control drug prices, to protect voting rights, to protect people with pre-existing conditions, to fight climate change, to protect your pensions -- the list goes on -- have all died in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard. To make real progress for real people we NEED to flip the Senate, and the path to flipping the Senate runs straight through Texas. We need MJ in office fighting for us because she'll actually do what's right for Texans, not special interests. To make that happen, we need to hit our goals, and that's going to take our grassroots team (that's you!). Make a matched donation today, before midnight, to help us hit our end-of-April goal, win the nomination, and take on Sen. Cornyn. | _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/-aqYlhhkGuGJFu45bKPLuoili7z9MsdRVaxM096Gm98=/s7Ob9aqksK2cuK2Jmr_E88kSHTZGiLlWWDN4keO16E0=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

We're in a time crunch so we'll get right to the point:

In just a few hours we will close the books on our April fundraising totals, and after a swift pick up in momentum yesterday, we're once again starting to see donations slow, but we're so close to being where we need to be.

**If we can get just $1,940 in the door by tonight, we 'll have officially met our April goal which will allow us to get the digital tools we need to better serve our community and win in November.**

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17325052/190463072/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjRhN2EzMC0wYjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ed2DUeaY86UKJ1E8fEhf9Coar_bc48L0aTjguGK7zs=&emci=af7f0ee7-e58a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=df4a7a30-0b8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10438639)
---
Dear Friend Here in Texas, certain businesses will be allowed to re-open, with limitations, as of tomorrow. Unfortunately, Texas has the worst uninsured rate in the nation, which at 17% is over twice the national average. With an astonishing 30+ million Americans out of work, over 60,000 dead, and an incomplete understanding of this disease, there are no easy decisions. Every path involves risk. At a minimum, we should be collectively sharing that risk. In that spirit I call on Governor Abbott to call a special session of the Texas State Legislature to provide health insurance to every Texan by expanding Medicaid under the ACA, or by some other mechanism as they see fit. As your congressman, I'll work to deliver quality, affordable health care to every Texan and every American. I'll also work relentlessly to earn and maintain your trust. **[Please, chip in to help make it happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17325053/190463073/-704092404?refcode=RKC_043020_em_fr_all_eom4_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjRhN2EzMC0wYjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ed2DUeaY86UKJ1E8fEhf9Coar_bc48L0aTjguGK7zs=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17325054/190463074/1282705599?refcode=RKC_043020_em_fr_all_eom4_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjRhN2EzMC0wYjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ed2DUeaY86UKJ1E8fEhf9Coar_bc48L0aTjguGK7zs=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17325055/190463075/1282705599?refcode=RKC_043020_em_fr_all_eom4_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjRhN2EzMC0wYjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ed2DUeaY86UKJ1E8fEhf9Coar_bc48L0aTjguGK7zs=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17325056/190463076/1282705599?refcode=RKC_043020_em_fr_all_eom4_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjRhN2EzMC0wYjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ed2DUeaY86UKJ1E8fEhf9Coar_bc48L0aTjguGK7zs=)**

clean_body: | Dear Friend Here in Texas, certain businesses will be allowed to re-open, with limitations, as of tomorrow. Unfortunately, Texas has the worst uninsured rate in the nation, which at 17% is over twice the national average. With an astonishing 30+ million Americans out of work, over 60,000 dead, and an incomplete understanding of this disease, there are no easy decisions. Every path involves risk. At a minimum, we should be collectively sharing that risk. In that spirit I call on Governor Abbott to call a special session of the Texas State Legislature to provide health insurance to every Texan by expanding Medicaid under the ACA, or by some other mechanism as they see fit. As your congressman, I'll work to deliver quality, affordable health care to every Texan and every American. I'll also work relentlessly to earn and maintain your trust. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Be safe, and thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Tracing (and stopping) the spread
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
“It’s incredible what they’re doing.” – President Trump

<>

Friends,

On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb announced an exciting new partnership that will
add to Indiana’s COVID-19 testing capacity by 30,000 tests a week.

And yesterday, he announced a new program that will expand and centralize
Indiana’s ability to conduct contact tracing of COVID-19 patients.

What is Contact Tracing?
<>
Contact tracing is an important step to stopping the spread. This process
allows the state to:

* Better trace who has been infected.
* Contact those they’ve come in contact with.
* Consult and treat those individuals directly and limit further exposure.

This new, centralized system will free up local health resources to focus on
other localized health needs. And it’s conducted with afocus on health and
privacy – health professionals are only gathering the information they need to
track (and limit) the virus’ spread. And that information will stay private.

With our increase in testing, and a phased reopening likely coming in May, it
is expected we’ll see an increase in positive COVID-19 cases. Contact tracing
is another vital tool to slowing the spread as more Hoosiers are out and about.

There have been a number of positive developments already this week in our
COVID-19 fight – an increase in testing that will add 100,000 tests a month,
the new contact tracing partnership, an announcement that Indiana has acquired
the means to clean, sanitize and reuse several pieces of PPE, and the reopening
of some elective medical procedures.

“It’s incredible what they’re doing.” – President Trump on Indiana’s COVID-19
response

As Governor Holcomb said, we’re nearing the end of the second quarter. At some
point soon, our state will open back up and, with your continued diligence,
we’ll be able to do so in a safe, measured and healthy way.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew

Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: House DFL Updates
subject: We can't become Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7hGsAgvmrd6LKQVvcnF_sN_F2PkEMbqUZ9d27RnbP-U=/SltUjpU-UKtJU11yWAjVh6pjxbEYAdVyla96cD42mIE=?refcode=043020)
| | Friend, Like you, we watched with horror earlier this month as Wisconsin forced voters to the polls in the middle of a global pandemic. Now, predictably, dozens of Wisconsin voters have been diagnosed with COVID-19 as a result. **We cannot become Wisconsin.** House DFLers are advocating to expand mail-in voting in the state of Minnesota. [A recent poll](https://act.myngp.com/el/7hGsAgvmrd6LKQVvcnF_sN_F2PkEMbqUZ9d27RnbP-U=/jfl8W9nKwwnj-5TvxlZu5d31BA1Nms3wbKLkHGOJWYg=) found that 63% of Minnesotans think that every voter in the state should be sent an absentee ballot. **The House DFL is ready, but Minnesota Republicans are refusing to act.** No one should lose their life or risk getting sick to exercise their right to vote. It's time to do the right thing and expand mail-in voting in the state of Minnesota. Thank you, House DFL Team [_P.S. In Minnesota you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be**completely refunded** to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund program._](https://act.myngp.com/el/7hGsAgvmrd6LKQVvcnF_sN_F2PkEMbqUZ9d27RnbP-U=/Gz_YOhq2_0Tzz1CS5ER430bOVT0868C6JKcKMFO8-n4=?refcode=043020) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7hGsAgvmrd6LKQVvcnF_sN_F2PkEMbqUZ9d27RnbP-U=/SltUjpU-UKtJU11yWAjVh6pjxbEYAdVyla96cD42mIE=?refcode=043020)

clean_body: | | Friend, Like you, we watched with horror earlier this month as Wisconsin forced voters to the polls in the middle of a global pandemic. Now, predictably, dozens of Wisconsin voters have been diagnosed with COVID-19 as a result. We cannot become Wisconsin. House DFLers are advocating to expand mail-in voting in the state of Minnesota. = found that 63% of Minnesotans think that every voter in the state should be sent an absentee ballot. The House DFL is ready, but Minnesota Republicans are refusing to act. No one should lose their life or risk getting sick to exercise their right to vote. It's time to do the right thing and expand mail-in voting in the state of Minnesota. Thank you, House DFL Team | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. DFL House Caucus 255 E Plato Blvd Saint Paul MN 55107 United States = = = We are prohibited from taking PAC and lobbyist contributions during the legislative session. name: John Jackson
subject: FWD: need to know you’re with us
body:

Hope and optimism in YOU, Friend. In your committed desire to ensure that we keep Texas RED come November 3. In your support of a capitalist democracy, and not a government that is rooted in communist or socialist values.
But Friend, he can't do this alone. He can't do this without YOU.
**[He's going to be looking to see whether you chipped in to his End of Month fund which time to do so is quickly running out. JJ \----------Forwarded Message Below------- Friend,
I'm going to be honest, Friend. In March, my campaign decided to halt fundraising for a period of time. This was the right move, but ultimately set us very far behind in our fundraising goals, including April's goal.
We're at a "make-or-break" moment in our campaign. We have fallen behind in a big way, and my campaign manager has broken the news to me that we need to raise nearly almost TRIPLE what we would normally need at this point.
That's why I emailed YOU, specifically.
I know I can count on you, I know you won't let me down.

We're running out of chances to show this state that I am the conservative voice that Texas needs. The fighter that is desperately needed on the front lines to fend off the Far-Left's attempted grab for our state.
This is worth fighting, Friend.
**[All I ask is that you chip in anything you can. Whether it's $10 or $100, any amount will make a difference in ensuring we hit this CRUCIAL goal, Friend.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VI2L3j7ldEa9tDGqhQyChnYw_QuG0me98bTuGiN_EjhA82gpDo9iJaw7V0ohf03owm40f4lwGceaGKwcZ0VZBht365ncrBFuJ4YiN4U3Ja9mi7cirVr_NYRHSbv87JM42T_6HA4uNlMBI0aBp10nvI2yKIJU-OaXcf_3_qkeSVhasvE6mJdVoqhZIUyWc9h0IOdg3Je0uSSyxPhB2IMAmlN67_VPzZJjw7SRLRGgGMQa5N51VJqaHUsa2p8BHO7ZrzzvoCON5cUXo_Ff9xLDO084SeLgCFWkemczYcliiLLx4ftJEBIUK0YP16sPLYHYNv6SC4tzxHZvjIKnm1vbVSMVkCm5e7BZ&c=DufuWnJu0LTicFXrMkShnxPGoICjR88Al0uwAqC-pf0TZWjJgZMqcA==&ch=CNoSB63Eg5fjtjHzzEOmGK8qHptu-_P78NjWOUvPcQVbrwAiFZheRA==)** Thanks for your support over the last few weeks, Friend. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VI2L3j7ldEa9tDGqhQyChnYw_QuG0me98bTuGiN_EjhA82gpDo9iJdfX7_XEAUtSbv73R8I1mWNPhlcxIsCswrSxk2nHlxWQks6PN4g8Vlkf4-iB8A0yFAKoaj5v7OJsoHijj0r45eAkzsCvyBzC1udfM5nbdXBZuM0HihnGXZvlZgMJR68O68gIsVyVW-Eg8CmHRZwlIN6cGodJ7S0YyiSIMjbr_rEPpEjc-WYv9u8y1O3_Jopw1g7PO6nmRq435jkW4EB0XvrVRA2OAqWHwOMfByC-NGJISvhZqlUY8EpqBsPyfvcBuA==&c=DufuWnJu0LTicFXrMkShnxPGoICjR88Al0uwAqC-pf0TZWjJgZMqcA==&ch=CNoSB63Eg5fjtjHzzEOmGK8qHptu-_P78NjWOUvPcQVbrwAiFZheRA==) and find out exactly how you can help. name: Mitch McConnell
subject: We can't get beat again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
My liberal opponent, handpicked by Chuck Schumer to replace me, drastically outraised us last quarter--nearly DOUBLING our fundraising total. Now, we're facing our April end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and we need to close the fundraising gap if we have any hope in keeping Kentucky RED this November.
\---From the Desk of Mitch McConnell---

My liberal opponent, handpicked by Chuck Schumer to replace me, drastically outraised us last quarter--nearly DOUBLING our fundraising total.

Now, we're facing our April end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and we need to close the fundraising gap if we have any hope in keeping Kentucky RED this November.

In order to ensure that we don't get beat out AGAIN, [**I 've activated 500% matching for all gifts that come in through tonight's deadline.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OoMC4ZPMRQJ_xfaxH1K-wB8AelgRrXs48RCpDoBNiC9bQTezbUmLzG1fJOy6Tb_19tPOAGvq4YJjilktAGnAGBoHRF_MIv-tpVoPRJao6hGZjs4N_7bd_7JdPRo9bVpYZjhnbL2l9UoeGucv1BELRp6mwCImsP4KKG8doQzUwNrmpGfK400qv4xITADO1k0P-vb4RBTbz8jlWG3ObsTJVK-T9ePoiBEJ-xDRG-iPC8GEhwCs7QqeI2bJNm_pdI8vJ2-6dn_n0ZP7XZcywtmrd0Xx26lf0rN7_f2WHfrMYWK2XlQBnp05Tov6VAzx91WBQ50uG24qo2n253vGmABIaUC9KZUTIKNOEX3yEZDcq5lOrHgT27RwIw==&c=9tNYB-dr9aKs2BYNh6HLpdPRQ44cT4OdeW1oqzwjzq2M6wdxyzCAtw==&ch=vDxYEyvp894eXjA008Mxv5FShqELGKIgxgome2s4zk8FkdOQkppUmA==)

I wouldn't be reaching out if it wasn't important, but we're in serious jeopardy of failing to reach our April fundraising goal, and I'm scared that if we don't reach our goal by midnight, we'll lose our GOP Majority this November.

Now, we're facing our April end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and we need to close the fundraising gap if we have any hope in keeping Kentucky RED this November. name: Dean Browning
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter Two - Abortion
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
In Chapter Two of our series, we will be digging into one of Lisa Scheller's most abhorrent policy positions that she wants to hide from voters.
The truth is that Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion. Lying Lisa Scheller has stated that she believes abortion should be legal. Yet during the current campaign she is trying to fool voters by claiming to be "pro-life" because she "supports the Hyde amendment". If I could tell Lying Lisa Scheller one thing it would be this...
You cannot say you believe abortion should be legal and then claim to be Pro-Life. Believing abortion should be legal makes you Pro-Abortion. Period! Being Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion is NOT a Republican value. It is NOT a Conservative value. Above all, it is an inhumane and immoral value. Let me be clear: I will always fight for and defend the lives of the unborn from the moment of conception forward!! That is why I need your support TODAY. We need to stop Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller from becoming the Republican nominee and supporting Rep. Susan Wild's Anti-Life Propaganda!
Can I count on you to contribute $100, $50, or even just $25 today, so we can protect the lives of the unborn?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s_ZyMoDq5wnUghu41xiaRni5L8wD-Kub20CzMDPD7vjYi-5x0wG2jfZ1OCz8GtGkH0v2_z0AahK0WRz_4epVXSOH_vkyAHkIoQbjxjFK2H4pfiA19dg-tDIcfsQzZ7DpG3CyrWX5yI1ZpgKDwVxF5rSEQbR7H9HjBDSCC0YsbQAJNy1EcOKxOQ==&c=e2ZAwPoY0vwQaBw2MYGpgCvn8D8lQ0_ZlYb7tBoql7FFvDg0vRxvuQ==&ch=_ens9pWhKpM9XhAUkKpZsKQVuqVoLvoUkPh9a7QPMLMqW6a3IIydbQ==)
---
| Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller has attempted to hide her abhorrent views by REFUSING to take the National Right to Life survey or any other pro-life survey. That is because her Establishment campaign handlers know that if she did, she would have to specifically state her views for everyone to see. Why has she not taken the survey? Simple. Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion and she does not want Republican voters to know the truth. Liberals like Lisa Scheller are the ones we need to watch out for; the ones who are wolves in sheep clothing masquerading as conservatives. We already have one Congresswoman, Susan Wild, who says one thing while believing and doing something completely different in Washington. We don't need another one just like her.
Let's put an end to abortion. Donate to my campaign today and we can fight for and defend the lives of the unborn.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, In Chapter Two of our series, we will be digging into one of Lisa Scheller's most abhorrent policy positions that she wants to hide from voters. The truth is that Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion. Lying Lisa Scheller has stated that she believes abortion should be legal. Yet during the current campaign she is trying to fool voters by claiming to be "pro-life" because she "supports the Hyde amendment". If I could tell Lying Lisa Scheller one thing it would be this... You cannot say you believe abortion should be legal and then claim to be Pro-Life. Believing abortion should be legal makes you Pro-Abortion. Period! Being Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion is NOT a Republican value. It is NOT a Conservative value. Above all, it is an inhumane and immoral value. Let me be clear: I will always fight for and defend the lives of the unborn from the moment of conception forward!! That is why I need your support TODAY. We need to stop Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller from becoming the Republican nominee and supporting Rep. Susan Wild's Anti-Life Propaganda! Can I count on you to contribute $100, $50, or even just $25 today, so we can protect the lives of the unborn? | | | == | Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller has attempted to hide her abhorrent views by REFUSING to take the National Right to Life survey or any other pro-life survey. That is because her Establishment campaign handlers know that if she did, she would have to specifically state her views for everyone to see. Why has she not taken the survey? Simple. Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion and she does not want Republican voters to know the truth. Liberals like Lisa Scheller are the ones we need to watch out for; the ones who are wolves in sheep clothing masquerading as conservatives. We already have one Congresswoman, Susan Wild, who says one thing while believing and doing something completely different in Washington. We don't need another one just like her. Let's put an end to abortion. Back in January, I endorsed Mondaire because for him, policy is personal, and he’ll never stop fighting for working people. | | | [

Since then, his campaign has kept up the momentum and been endorsed by Representative Ayanna Pressley, the Working Families Party, United Auto Workers, and so many more.
I am also so proud of the campaign he has put together. He is running his race the way campaigns ought to be run: fueled by grassroots donations and committed volunteers, not special interests and corporate PAC money.
But right now, Mondaire is coming up against a big fundraising deadline and he needs help from grassroots supporters like you. Today is his end-of-month fundraising deadline, and he still needs to raise $4,235 to hit his goal.
**_[If you’re in a place where you’re able to donate, can he count on you to make a contribution right now to get him where he needs to be?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BgE/ni0YAA/t.31d/wa7NF_giTtWWNUnF3CVo8Q/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKReThha5QIjAgea4S9L-2FBXSDgBvwBv7rPOcel3dDACkAMqVwqzWnIWnsYRdVJhQvOPNR1TZl1omUdYnmrwE0NZ-2B1a03KkXYpfCByIlVgj20s8deCIa94L65rooJNmQRkw1qgDDHyjYdY4jVXS1Rg2Q6mcUvRe-2BEaizgGvnydmzQw0elSh6IN4CSBMybEVQukd3F7v3UUFcrm0bZgGNWwfNcxFdczbsKoupc-2BOQ7pP2dICOSifiSrYmunpCuQucN4uofqAbS9ZfMCvmT6fL6AuYYLyTCjoIrqpVqUwmji2FHg-3D-3D/Pbt8)_**

Hey friend, I'm getting worried: With just hours to go until our critical match opportunity expires, we're still falling $7,694 short of our goal. With our Republican opponent spending millions from her personal fortune to buy this seat, grassroots support from people like you is the only way we can win. That's why this match opportunity is so important.
**If you 're ready to flip this seat, elect Reverend Warnock (D), and restore moral leadership to our government, can you please pitch in right away? All gifts made before midnight will be doubled to win this race and take back the Senate. **
**Here 's the link: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/warnock-match-2x](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e71f/288179be/a673174/348e9219/1620924417/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk170-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
If we lose in Georgia, Democrats won't be able to take back the Senate, plain and simple. The strength of this grassroots team has brought us neck and neck with unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) - but our opponent has promised to spend $20 million of her own fortune to keep this seat red, and Mitch McConnell is lining up the full backing of the GOP establishment to maintain his iron grip on the Senate.
_So when I say we need all the grassroots support we can get to win this race, I mean it._
That's why I'm asking you to take full advantage of this critical match opportunity before midnight tonight. Because falling short of our match goal could mean handing this race to Loeffler and Senate control back to Mitch McConnell for at least two more years. We can't let that happen.
We can flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate and restore moral leadership to Washington - but it all comes down to you, friend. Will you give now to have your gift doubled so we can take home the win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?
Here's the link one more time: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/warnock-match-2x](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e71f/288179be/a673174/348e9219/1620924417/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk170-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Best, Jerid

clean_body: We’re making history in Kansas. Will you stand with us one more time before the deadline and help ensure April is a record-breaking month for this campaign? | | | Team, I wanted to check in with you personally one more time before the midnight deadline. This has been a fantastic month for our campaign. Even though we’ve been forced off of the campaign trail for now in light of the public health crisis, this grassroots team has shown up in a tremendous way -- and a new poll shows us leading our likely Republican opponent. I am so grateful to everyone who has stepped up and joined this movement. I know that if we continue to keep up this momentum, we’ll be celebrating victory in November when we flip this seat and send a voice of reason to represent Kansas families and values in the U.S. Senate. My team just told me the good news: we’ve already surpassed our updated $50,000 end-of-month goal. I am continually blown away by the strength of this grassroots team -- and I know that with all of you by my side, we are going to win this race together. = Thank you for your continued support, Barbara Bollier = This campaign is powered by grassroots donors. Please =. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Small Business FAQs with Senator Tim Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Small businesses are the lifeblood of our country. They represent the core American Dream that anyone, no matter their race or religion, can work hard and build something to pass down to their children. It's that spirit that has made our Nation great and it's the spirit that drove me to run for Congress.

But those same small businesses are now facing unexpected challenges with the circumstances surrounding COVID-19. Many of them have been pushed to their limits and are in danger of closing forever.

That is why I was honored to be joined on Tuesday by Senator Tim Scott from the great state of South Carolina. A small business owner himself, Senator Scott has served as a champion for small businesses on the Small Business Committee in the Senate. He was kind enough to answer some of the frequently asked questions I have heard from business owners here in the 7th District

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=7f5886653c474684b39ad1de8987bb54&_e=7OQHx3Sg3Izd7fEHk92C7E8gqtr1zSHrAIhR_wHnc1TzDJGGYWACcUoqJMegsvXfA7TqjJlcqodqBl1tOfPxK7ubh6cf2e38G-FugzCy4VEjF7uXx9Y3-w0XhFTnQCjkRvUa79kKwu5cRYZKfjRZL1INXjYfr-N_zisGByFEqODfblPJS-3toUpLWb-1wpUVwQARQxL-UbmTZ_ZsukTnmWtpOkI63d9LJQuB6LFBll9iU22QXB6QYYSWcGvsCKzH-abFzreFPfvxEh_Tn-vLw4mnlZC6X_0hLQUCsOgdxwg%3D)

[Click here to watch the full video](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=7f5886653c474684b39ad1de8987bb54&_e=7OQHx3Sg3Izd7fEHk92C7E8gqtr1zSHrAIhR_wHnc1TzDJGGYWACcUoqJMegsvXfA7TqjJlcqodqBl1tOfPxK3iXGodnJREQzx8OTWCtLe_zSXC9L5sHNBxU5wos0usDB_j4tucq1GQr5BJ0xXatSLQQcrjnFzfgLMpBl3c2c_ROAfxqhb78J8lrdVWikpXlCymyfk9tzC8iMCneQLT_Ye6Z7Y38HJt7HP1t_2I6L_o9AfaJ4ZQbFaVGJDeZOf_-roEqrPmzFVUmXjfMfOOpOFhwkdbVj0l2_ajAWSFoOQE%3D)

If you have any follow up comments or questions for either myself or the Senator, please let me know.

Houston has one of the strongest, most resilient communities in the entire country. I'm confident that we will adapt and come out of this stronger than ever, but for now need to do everything possible to support these businesses.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=7f5886653c474684b39ad1de8987bb54&_e=7OQHx3Sg3Izd7fEHk92C7FWAOYfLbGyEAhDr0duTitX_DCtMttUELEuF2TiYH3bYcSiR78mLlSHwpPFpw9JTf-OsP3WlMsmSHcg-cykDHZ7k2oJph1rmQO1vKpqeePerJUNjSp3ffPbX4DjyKXF_cjGmxUBjkUkJChan8eBadqFUqFvutiTb6iSp2lhO-ayHuKn-cAYdNOK9cUX8M1LoF3u4XDq3wMt6lay_KWa5qUNwFHBHdYb-n9kN7uiwj8gkIdgsVHas6BVt9QeZr2VAPXqTOMq_dT56RdCsTyQToVY%3D)****

body:
We are closing in on our monthly goal, but we need your help to reach it! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a0ecf4e637f0/ill-be-quick?e=140a9b81e7)

| |

| |
#
I'll be quick. **Our end of the month fundraising deadline is midnight tonight and we still need 250 individual contributions to hit our goal. Can you chip in $5 or $10 to help us reach our goal?**
---
| [CHIP IN HERE](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=df1ca33bf7&e=140a9b81e7 "CHIP IN HERE")
---
| With your help, we have grabbed the momentum in this race, and here's what that means:
* We can win this race if, and only if, we continue to hit our fundraising goals.
* Outside groups like the NRA and fossil fuel lobbyists will stop at nothing to protect our opponent. **We'll be up against millions in outside spending from conservative interest groups. **
* In the next six months, we need your support more than ever to make sure outside groups do not drown out our message in the 16th.

Here is how you can help: In just 14 hours we'll be hitting the end of April. We've got a chance to flip this seat from red to blue in November, but only with your help. You can count on me to fight for our progressive values like Medicare for All, campaign finance reform, and forgiving student debt. **Can I count on you to[make a donation to our grassroots campaign today and lead us to a win in November?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=9dc385ca4b&e=140a9b81e7)**
