I got in this race last August because the people of the 6th District deserve a real representative in Washington. We deserve someone who’ll fight for us, not for corporate special interests — and we need it now more than ever.
Since day one, I’ve rejected donations from the corporate PACs and dark-money donors funding my opponent. That means we’ve had to do it the old-fashioned way: with grassroots, small-dollar donations from regular folks.
**Together we’ve built an organization based on shared values and uplifting everyday Kentuckians. And it’s working.**
[_**But we need your help to grow our campaign as we head into the primary and scale up our operation. Can you chip in $5 or $10 and help hit our goal before midnight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17326722/190486363/-300075527?refcode=HIC_20200430_em_fr_eom5_all_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjk0MmIxMy0xNThiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W779xN6zZ0yJHOKciAi4e5Strquq2zQ2LnYdqbgrGLw=)

body:
Democrats only need to flip FOUR seats in November to take control of the Senate, and they're outpacing Republicans in the fundraising race. Will you help Marsha ensure conservatives have enough resources to combat the lies and attacks?

Hi,

Marsha wanted us to reach out regarding tonight's fundraising deadline.

We know you've received some communications from us over the past couple of days, but we want to stress how important this deadline is for Republicans, which is why she's authorized a [_**3X match on ALL grassroots contributions through midnight**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTI4MjkS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzExNzM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Marsha is committed to defending the Republican Senate Majority, which is under threat.

Democrats only need to flip FOUR seats in November to take control of the Senate, and they're outpacing Republicans in the fundraising race. _**Will you help Marsha ensure conservatives have enough resources to combat the lies and attacks?**_

[**DONATE BY 11:59 TONIGHT**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTI4MjkS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzExNzM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

With the Left's constant charades and political games over the last four years, Republicans have faced obstacles at every turn... Bogus Russia collusion, sham impeachment trials, grandstanding at Supreme Court nominee confirmation hearings, and countless other atrocities all made to discredit our nation's president.

Enough is enough.

Let's put an end to these ridiculous games and fight for continued progress on the conservative agenda. [**Stand with Marsha and make a 3X-matched donation before our deadline at Midnight to put a stop to the Democrats ' circus.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTI4MjkS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzExNzM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Hern
subject: Did you hear?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
We’re matching donations, but it’s only for a limited time! Find out more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/5f5a3b301ac92d2cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, Did you see Kevin’s recent email about our generous donor? We’re so excited that we have someone on board who is willing to match donations, dollar-for-dollar. It’s such an amazing opportunity to double your impact by giving today! We are living in uncertain times, but elections are still going forward, and it’s more important than ever to keep our momentum going as our operations have moved almost solely online. **[Will you help us out and click HERE to donate now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/cb4be85b30ef8513c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** We’re incredibly grateful for your support! **Keep scrolling to read Kevin’s email and find out more.** Thanks,
Team Hern | |
---
Peter,

Are you hanging in there OK with the coronavirus lockdown? I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these unprecedented times.

It’s certainly changed the way we do things when it comes to campaigning, to say the least.

Normally I love getting out and meeting people, and shaking the hands of the good citizens who put me in office and trusted me to represent them in Congress. It’s obviously just not possible to do that now, as we are all practicing social distancing to help flatten the curve and protect our most vulnerable citizens.

With the spread of COVID-19, we have moved all our campaign operations online, and are relying on your help to keep our momentum going.

And we have amazing news! We have a generous donor who has agreed to match all fundraising from now until 11:59 PM on April 30.

Will you donate today to double your impact and keep our momentum going? Being nearly 100 percent digital has caused an urgent need to meet our fundraising goals. We want to get a new ad up and get it in front of as many people as possible, and we need your help to make that happen. **Can you contribute today?**

**[Contribute $5>>> Make a $10 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/230cf9f8696f4881c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
**[Contribute $25>>> Make a $50 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/94757ec63cb7bdfbc3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
**[Contribute $50>>> Make a $100 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/c5107fd9d43a95c7c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
**[Contribute $100>>> Make a $200 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/74668f9c33da8b67c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
**[Contribute $250>>> Make a $500 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/ab35d06dda630fa3c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**

Thank you so much for your help and support. Elections are still moving forward, and we need to make sure we keep this seat RED!

-Kevin Hern

P.S. During these turbulent times, I want to make sure you’re taking care of yourself and your family first. Please only give if you are able to do so. Thank you so much!
[ **Donate NOW >>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cd81e01d4bdc30c5/12ec9b2bc179baa0c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Dean Browning
subject: re: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter One
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
You may or may not know that my Republican challenger, Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller, has used her big-money donors to create a website with gutter style, fabricated personal attacks on me. Lisa Scheller has gone to desperate measures, calling in back up from the Washington Swamp itself.
She handsomely paid Washington Insiders to smear me and my campaign in a desperate attempt to cover up her own agenda. Truthfully, this does not surprise me.
I am actually honored that she feels so threatened by my campaign that she would dump tons of money into a ridiculous and childish website. THIS SHOWS THAT WE ARE WINNING THIS ELECTION!! In response to Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller's feeble attempt to derail my campaign, I am launching a series: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller. Over the course of the next two weeks, I will expose her liberal agenda, her hypocrisy, and her exploitation of public office to make money for herself, and her company that received millions of dollars from the Obama Administration and from China. , we have Liberal Lying Lisa Scheller on her heels, and I need your help to win this Primary Election!
Will you help support the cause and chip in $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign?

subject: One last time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi -- I wanted to reach out personally one last time before this month ended. Our campaign may have gone entirely virtual, but we still are staying creative and innovative in the way we’re running it. In the last month, we not only launched a webinar series, but we also qualified for the ballot by getting over 6,000 petitions signed (back when we could go door to door). Despite all of this, we still have an end of month fundraising deadline, and we’re still running short of our goal with just hours left. We only have until midnight to raise the final $763 we need to stay on track. Could you contribute right now? name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Sealing Borders Saves Lives During Coronavirus Pandemic
body:
“It’s the mantra of the World Health Organization and globalists everywhere: The coronavirus does not respect borders.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e6afac702&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sealing Borders Saves Lives During Coronavirus Pandemic**

“It’s the mantra of the World Health Organization and globalists everywhere: The coronavirus does not respect borders,” Miranda Devine writes in the _New York Post_.

“But this makes no sense. It is ideology, not science. Closing a country’s borders is the ultimate in social distancing.” The island nations of Australia and New Zealand took their cue from President Trump, who ignored the WHO’s open-borders advice. So far, both countries have experienced fewer than 4 deaths per 1 million people.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e27a5a2cd9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The administration’s dedication to small businesses during this pandemic is not just a fight for brick-and-mortar businesses—it’s a fight for the blood, sweat, and tears of 47% of the domestic workforce. Blue-collar businesses and small businesses alike are the bread and butter of our communities,” Corina Morga writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=88edfb9fd6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The Left’s rhetoric regarding President Donald J. Trump’s COVID-19 response grows sharper, even as this virus’ hospitalization and death curves grow flatter . . . These partisan bitter- enders can’t handle the truth: Trump’s leadership mobilized sufficient resources to avoid the far-graver destruction the Left foresaw,” Deroy Murdock writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dfd9006720&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/trump-teams-coronavirus-response-inspired-motivated-americans-deroy-murdock").
---
|
---
| President Trump will visit a Honeywell facility in Arizona next week to highlight critical medical equipment production along with the addition of 500 manufacturing jobs. “Honeywell expects to produce more than six million N95 masks for Arizona over the next year to combat the coronavirus outbreak,” [KTAR News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56529db68a&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=476ea8139c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=626e52765b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f00ee57207)

We're now one step closer to solidifying our place on the ballot this November. But let me be clear, the road ahead is going to be challenging beyond what any of us can currently predict. With so many uncertainties right now, it's vital that I have folks like you on my side for the long term.
Friend,

Colorado's first-ever virtual State Republican Assembly last weekend was truly humbling. Despite the hardships faced by so many right now, our supporters proved once again that they were with me all the way. We're now one step closer to solidifying our place on the ballot this November. **But let me be clear, the road ahead is going to be challenging beyond what any of us can currently predict.**

With so many uncertainties right now, it's vital that I have folks like you on my side for the long term. That's why I'm reaching out again today, Friend. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: History in the Making
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
The 2020 Indiana Republican Convention will be televised and livestreamed for the first time ever!In whatever form our convention eventually takes... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/history-in-the-making?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| Hoosier Republicans,

Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer has some exciting news to share.

**This year, we will make history at our 2020 State Convention! For the first time ever, the 2020 Indiana Republican Convention will be televised and livestreamed.** WISH-TV in Indianapolis and its news partners across the state will air our convention live, giving all Hoosiers the opportunity to see our Party of Purpose at work.

**While your state committee is working on contingency plans should we need to make changes due to COVID-19, our goal remains to conduct our 2020 convention in the traditional, in-person manner.

And WISH-TV will have access to cover our convention live in whatever form our convention eventually takes. **

“This is exciting news for our party,” Chairman Hupfer said. “We’ve always operated in an open and transparent way and continue to look for ways to broaden our party. I’m glad DeJuan McCoy and his team at WISH agreed to partner on this historic first in Indiana politics!”

It is more critical than ever to broaden the reach of our party. Chairman Hupfer recognized the potential that televising our event can achieve. He reached out to WISH-TV, spoke with DeJuan and the team, and the rest is—or soon will be—history.

At the convention, a statewide audience will watch Governor Eric Holcomb deliver the keynote address before he’s on the ballot this November. The governor’s leadership during the global pandemic has earned him high praise. Hoosiers will want to continue hearing more on his vision for the future of our great state.

“It just makes sense to broadcast our convention and let more people see our party at work,” added Hupfer. “Interest in our convention will be high and interest in this year’s election will be even higher. The more Hoosiers we can reach, the more they’re engaged in our state’s future.”

**The convention will also be streamed online, allowing Hoosiers outside of WISH-TV and its partners’ viewing areas to watch Governor Holcomb’s keynote speech, our nominations for Lt. Governor and Attorney General, candidate speeches, and additional business we’ll undertake at the convention. **

**If an in-person convention cannot be conducted in a safe and healthy manner, these speeches and nominations will be delivered in-studio and broadcast live.**

Thanks to Chairman Hupfer and WISH-TV, we’ll make history at our convention in June. And then we know that with the hard work and enthusiasm of grassroots Republican supporters like you, we’ll make even more history this November!

Thanks,
Your Indiana Republican Party
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=41f4b2fe7e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Booker for Senate
subject: We have to ask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Last chance. |
#
Folks, this is one of the last chances we have to hit our April goal before the clock strikes midnight. As we write to you, we're $11,963 short of tonight's goal. Meanwhile, there are no less than five GOP contenders who are hoping to defeat Cory for his seat in the Senate this November. name: Corky Messner
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
We’re almost to our fundraising goal — can you help us reach it? Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/09273b7c2fad317c/a77181b04fea2bd1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, **How are you holding up during this COVID-19 crisis?** I hope you and your loved ones are staying healthy and safe. It’s certainly thrown a wrench into our campaign plans, as we’ve had to cancel all of our in-person events, and move all of our fundraising operations online. We’ve fallen behind due to this change, and it is imperative that we raise **$2,450** before Midnight tonight to remain on track to hit our end-of-month goal, and beat Pelosi's pal Jeanne Shaheen. **[Will you donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can right now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/09273b7c2fad317c/ac00140559d3da27c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Jeanne Shaheen has shown her true colors of partisanship during this pandemic. **END OF APRIL DONATION STATUS** **EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **DEADLINE:** 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT

The woman who constantly crows about bipartisanship and how we must all work together demonstrates time and again that she will not break from the progressive orthodoxy no matter how critical the situation or important the opportunity.

Does she really think that voters in New Hampshire and America can’t see through the Congressional Democrats’ tactics to use this pandemic to push through their progressive agenda?

## **Peter, this could be bad.**
**Trump is planning a visit to Arizona next week and regardless of how it goes it 's bound to change the state of the Senate race.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04ca/72412298/4f8881ca/61048bc1/1005312039/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9hcHJpbCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNDMwX0FaRU9NX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_april?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200430_AZEOM_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200430_AZEOM_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200430_AZEOM_U1_X1") The GOP is _**DESPERATE**_ to keep their hand-picked and unelected Senator Martha McSally and to hold onto this Senate Seat. So, they are sending in everything they've got -- even the President in the middle of a pandemic! name: Unite the Country
subject: Three ways you can help Joe Biden right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
Will you spread the word on social media?
#
_Peter, we hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy. We are relying on supporters like you more than ever to share important news and updates. Right now, you can help by sharing information about Joe Biden's economic recovery plan and how Democrats are united behind him to defeat Donald Trump. _
* * *
**Watch & Share**
Sanders. Warren. Obama. The Democrats are united to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden as the next President of the United States. We're ready to get to work. Will you watch and share?
[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e76703b/4093482785/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/dSErffqhVo")
**[WATCH ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e76703b/4093482785/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/dSErffqhVo")**
**[WATCH ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767024/4093482785/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/763289730868840/")**

**Spread the Word**
The United Auto Workers backed Joe Biden's recent plan to reopen the economy. The UAW represents more than 400,000 workers including workers at General Motors Co., Ford Motor Co., and Fiat Chrysler Automobiles NV. The UAW says "Biden's plan relies on experts and science-based factors, acknowledges the need for adequate testing and oversight safety in reopening workplaces, and is devoid of partisan acrimony."
**[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767025/4093482785/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bloomberg.com%2Fnews%2Farticles%2F2020-04-20%2Fuaw-endorses-biden-reopening-plan-after-trump-s-task-force-snub&via=unitecountrypac&text=ICMYI%3A%20The%20@UAW%20backed%20Joe%20Biden%27s%20plan%20to%20reopen%20the%20economy.%20&hashtags=UniteForBiden")**
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767026/4093482785/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2020-04-20/uaw-endorses-biden-reopening-plan-after-trump-s-task-force-snub")**

Share
Joe Biden is right: we need to choose hope over fear and come together and defeat this virus. Will you share his quote on social media?
[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767027/4093482785/VEsA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC/status/1252258220342677506?s=20")
**[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767027/4093482785/VEsB/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC/status/1252258220342677506?s=20")**
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767020/4093482785/VEsO/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/photos/a.119605989473475/227777355323004/?type=3&theater")**

Will you spread the word on social media? [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767021/4093482785/VEsP/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767022/4093482785/VEsHBQ/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e767023/4093482785/VEsHBA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://instagram.com/unitethecountry")
* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df762b/287b9173/2b05b542/7e76702c/4093482785/VEsHBw/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: The Franken Crew
subject: FW: All engines ahead full!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We hope you saw the Admiral's last message, crew. He's asking us to put everything we can into this campaign.
|
---
| |
---

| | We hope you saw the Admiral's last message, crew. He's asking us to put everything we can into this campaign. The Admiral does as he says. He matched thousands of your donations with his own money. These are wages earned while defending this country, often serving overseas and in combat theaters. He and his family are committed to winning this, and he needs our help. [_**Please read his note, and drop some coin to boost the campaign into May. We need this as soon as possible.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf662/31545854/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_l1") | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf663/31545854/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_btn1")
---
Thank you,
The Franken Crew
Proud to Serve!

\--------- Forwarded message --------
From: Mike Franken
Date: Just one month
Subject: April 29, 2020
Hello everyone:
Today's command is, "All engines ahead full." That's the command given for a high-speed run for a relatively short duration on a warship at sea. Now's the time, the end of April, when we need the numbers to blow the pundits off their perch -- because FRANKEN FOR IOWA has the trajectory to win this primary.
My opponent in this year-long effort is Sen. Joni Ernst, but I must first win the primary. Our most valuable outreach tool, meeting Iowans in person, has been covidly-curtailed. Okay, we adapted. Our TV ad is doing well (rave reviews); our social media is going coast-to-coast; and our volunteer outreach is banging out over a thousand calls per day.
We can hand Joni Ernst and the Trump-era Republicans a big defeat in Iowa, but first the primary.
**As Kimberley stated, we are just under $85,000 from having the resources needed for May. I ask you to help.**[_**We 're activating our grassroots donors to contribute before midnight on May 2nd.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf67c/31545854/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_l2")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf67d/31545854/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_abx5")
---
[DONATE $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf67e/31545854/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_abx10")
---
[DONATE $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf67f/31545854/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_abx25")
---
[Other Amount >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf678/31545854/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=15&refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_abxother")
---
Survive this pandemic, rebuild our economy, fix health care, kick-start an infrastructure plan, and make Iowa's agriculture sector viable -- these are action items for Congress under a new leadership. Send me, I'm ready. No training wheels needed.
[_**But, I can 't win in November if we don't win on June 2nd. So, if you can, please chip in to help us chart a course to victory!**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf679/31545854/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_l3")
Thank you, and very respectfully,
Mike Franken
Iowa's Admiral

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a8/33365068/4a74bada/3f8bf67a/31545854/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200430_em_fr_eom3_all_ftr")
---

name: Dr. Chuck Dietzen for Congress
subject: Fwd: **Critical Campaign Needs**
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
With less than five weeks to go, your support can make ALL the difference! Read more >>
Fellow Hoosier, David sent you an important message the other day. If you missed it, you can read it below. We’re now less than five weeks away from the June 2nd primary election, and your support is crucial! I have had the opportunity to meet so many amazing Hoosiers throughout the course of this campaign. Whether you attended an event, donated funds, put a sign in your yard, or shared my candidacy with your family and friends, I am blessed and grateful to have your support. [**Please watch my video, and then chip in $5 (or more if you can) to fund our critical voter outreach efforts**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/f8a9def6719166e6c3d6b838967d376c/33363). [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/918f8ab4a0e6c3c8c3d6b838967d376c/33363) It's vital that we close strong over the weeks ahead. We’re locked in a tough race in a crowded field.

With coronavirus impacting our lives in a big way, it’s clear politics and healthcare intersect. We need result focused LEADERSHIP in Congress... let’s work together to put a DOCTOR in the HOUSE.

Again, **[please chip in $5 or more today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/d963e0873fcd87a7c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**. Every contribution will be a huge help.

\- Dr. Chuck | |
---
From: David Buskill, Campaign Manager
To: All Supporters
Date: Monday, April 27, 2020 5:00 p.m.
Subject: **Critical Campaign Needs**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/c8bae0ed908e90a7c3d6b838967d376c/33363)
Friend,

Dr. Chuck and I want to say THANK YOU to everyone who requested one of his yard signs.

_It’s great to see so many supporters showing their neighbors where they stand!_

This is truly an election season unlike any other in our lifetime. Meet-and-greet events and door-knocking are off the table... but we still need to reach voters.

That’s why I’m writing today. **We’re launching a vital end-of-month fundraising drive, to gather the resources we need to close strong in this primary race and WIN on June 2nd.**

You can see the direct impact your support will make below.

Please respond today... every donation will be a HUGE help as we work to send Dr. Chuck to Congress!

**[Chip in $5 – Sponsor a Yard Sign](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/c12ad32aeb63b970c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**

**[Chip in $10 – Sponsor Our Phone Banking Software](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/56148db373b6ac57c3d6b838967d376c/33363)
**

**[Chip in $25 – Sponsor Mailers](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/4a1d9eadbd984c36c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**

**[Chip in $50 – Sponsor Our Online Ads](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/14e6b85e8a7e33dec3d6b838967d376c/33363)**

**[Chip in $100 – Sponsor Our TV Ads](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/bd1ef311c82282a2c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**

Thank you in advance for ANY contribution you’re able to make. Dr. Chuck is running to represent our Hoosier values in Washington and deliver results. Career politicians play games, Dr. Chuck wants to work to benefit the American people.

**[If you’re on board, please don’t wait to make a contribution](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/dfcc9abe8ed66871c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**.

We have just 36 days to go until the primary!

All the best,

David Buskill
Campaign Manager
Chuck Dietzen for Congress
[ **Donate HERE >>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/61742d65eeaac052c3d6b838967d376c/33363)
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/4732fe6e2ac286a4c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/7c8f1e3db19fbda0/2cbd7892bdfd0e06c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter Two - Abortion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| ,

In Chapter Two of our series, we will be digging into one of Lisa Scheller’s most abhorrent policy positions that she wants to hide from voters.

**The truth is that Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion.**

Lying Lisa Scheller has stated that she believes abortion should be legal. Yet during the current campaign, she is trying to fool voters by claiming to be “pro-life” because she “supports the Hyde amendment”.

If I could tell Lying Lisa Scheller one thing it would be this...

**You cannot say you believe abortion should be legal and then claim to be Pro-Life.
Believing abortion should be legal makes you Pro-Abortion. Period!
** Being Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion is NOT a Republican value.
It is NOT a Conservative value.
Above all, it is an inhumane and immoral value.
**Let me be clear: I will always fight for and defend the lives of the unborn from the moment of conception forward!!**

That is why I need your support TODAY. We need to stop Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller from becoming the Republican nominee, and supporting Rep. Susan Wild’s Anti-Life Propaganda!

**Can I count on you to contribute $100, $50, or even just $25 today, so we can protect the lives of the unborn?**
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=7a11ca22d2&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| | Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller has attempted to hide her abhorrent views by REFUSING to take the National Right to Life survey or any other pro-life survey. That is because her Establishment campaign handlers know that if she did, she would have to specifically state her views for everyone to see.

**Why has she not taken the survey? Simple. Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abortion and she does not want Republican voters to know the truth.
**
Liberals like Lisa Scheller are the ones we need to watch out for; the ones who are wolves in sheep clothing masquerading as conservatives. We already have one Congresswoman, Susan Wild, who says one thing while believing and doing something completely different in Washington. We don’t need another one just like her.

**Let’s put an end to abortion. Donate to my campaign today and we can fight for and defend the lives of the unborn.**
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=55ddaedaf9&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| Tune in Monday to catch Chapter Three of the __**Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.**__

**For Freedom,**
---
|
---
| **Dean Browning
Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07**

P.S. ~ Did you know that Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller is Anti-Life and Pro-Abort? We need to stop her today!

**Show your support of the Pro-Life movement by donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today!**

name: Georgia Senate Alert
subject: re: McConnell's handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If we lose, McConnell gets two more years.
| | |
---
**_THE WASHINGTON POST:_ A DEMOCRATIC WIN IN GEORGIA KEY TO ENDING MCCONNELL'S SENATE MAJORITY**
Friend: Right now, polling shows Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) TIED - in a race that analysts at _The Washington Post_ say is key to deciding Senate control!
That's why a GOP super PAC has set its sights on Georgia as a TOP target, and why McConnell is lining up the FULL backing of the Republican establishment to support his handpicked candidate. Simply put, Mitch McConnell is SCRAMBLING.
We have a historic opportunity to elect Reverend Warnock as Georgia's first black senator, flip this seat and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all - but Loeffler is flooding this race with $20 MILLION of her own fortune, and we need your immediate grassroots support to fight back.
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can win in Georgia and take back the Senate, but we can't do it alone. And with just HOURS left until our critical match opportunity expires, we're still falling $4,291 short of our goal. **
**[_Please, friend: Will you give $5 or more now - as much as you can afford - to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e713/288179be/a627304/348e93c9/1796498495/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTg2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk186-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Hailey Barringer
subject: must-read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Women's health care is health care. Plain and simple.
|
---

| | In case you missed it, I want to make sure you saw this message from EMILY's List President Stephanie Schriock. Kathy is an unwavering champion for reproductive rights and women's health care -- _because women 's health care is health care._ [_**We 're so proud to have EMILY's List and Stephanie's support in this fight, but we can't do it without you, too. So if you can, please chip in to our campaign before the end-of-month deadline at midnight.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d317/3d199a51/2f758a8b/7364fe86/2755156303/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQzMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200430?refcode=kme200430_nd_other&refcode2=17426") Thanks! Hailey _\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Stephanie Schriock**
Date: Wed, Apr 29, 2020
Subject: RE: Kathy Manning_ | [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d317/3d199a51/2f758a8b/7364fe86/2755156303/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQzMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200430?refcode=kme200430_nd_other&refcode2=17426")
---
Friend,
Hi there -- I'm Stephanie Schriock, the president of EMILY's List.
**At EMILY 's List, we elect strong pro-choice Democratic women, and we're so proud to endorse Kathy Manning.**
| | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d317/3d199a51/2f758a8b/7364fe86/2755156303/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQzMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200430?refcode=kme200430_nd_other&refcode2=17426")
---
When we endorsed Kathy for her 2018 campaign, I spoke to her about her personal experience as a mother who was concerned about being able to afford the health care her daughter needed while suffering from a chronic illness.
Kathy knew that no parent should have to choose between paying a child's medical bills or being able to afford to put food on the table for their family. She knew that something had to change, and she ran for office to change it.
**That 's why Kathy is exactly the kind of strong leader we need in Congress right now.**
Kathy ran a strong race in 2018 and, while she didn't prevail, we're thrilled that she's running again in the newly-drawn 6th District.
Kathy will be a champion for North Carolinians -- one who will fight to make sure they have access to high-quality and affordable health care and education, and who will fight to safeguard our values and our rights.
[_**At EMILY 's List, we know that early support is essential to building strong campaigns that can win on Election Day. And that's why I'm reaching out to you today: Will you make a contribution to Kathy's campaign and send a strong leader to Washington?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d317/3d199a51/2f758a8b/7364fe86/2755156303/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQzMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200430?refcode=kme200430_nd_other&refcode2=17426")

Kathy is an unwavering champion for reproductive rights and women's health care -- because women 's health care is health care. "" Thanks! Hailey \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Stephanie Schriock Date: Wed, Apr 29, 2020 Subject: RE: Kathy Manning | "" Friend, Hi there -- I'm Stephanie Schriock, the president of EMILY's List. At EMILY 's List, we elect strong pro-choice Democratic women, and we're so proud to endorse Kathy Manning. | | "" When we endorsed Kathy for her 2018 campaign, I spoke to her about her personal experience as a mother who was concerned about being able to afford the health care her daughter needed while suffering from a chronic illness. Kathy knew that no parent should have to choose between paying a child's medical bills or being able to afford to put food on the table for their family. She knew that something had to change, and she ran for office to change it. That 's why Kathy is exactly the kind of strong leader we need in Congress right now. Kathy ran a strong race in 2018 and, while she didn't prevail, we're thrilled that she's running again in the newly-drawn 6th District. Kathy will be a champion for North Carolinians -- one who will fight to make sure they have access to high-quality and affordable health care and education, and who will fight to safeguard our values and our rights. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thanks for all you do, Stephanie Schriock President, EMILY's List | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please ""

name: Team Stanton
subject: we are asking for just $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
We know this is a tough time for many Arizonans, but it is more important than ever that we support competent, empathetic, and effective leaders like Greg if we are going to get through this crisis together.

_That 's why we are not asking for big donations from our supporters right now, because we know times are tough._

**But if you are in a position to give just $5 per month to Greg 's campaign between now and election day, your support will help us cover the costs of mailers, digital ads, and cellular charges for the campaign so we can continue reaching voters while social distancing.**

[**With just a couple hours left before our MIDNIGHT FUNDRAISING DEADLINE, will you consider making a $5 monthly contribution?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/EaccE8V6m-201a059El2PPTZhMHiz6TlamdMUMazRMs=/eo5M1Nz0QT2SA1wy58NE23_CqjsobS0bDCWDXVuxX8k=?refcode=X_043020_EOM_D&amount=5&recurring=auto)

Thank you!

\-- _Team Stanton_

The COVID-19 pandemic has laid bare the long-term implications of the policies of the last two decades. Nobody wants an intrusive government telling us how to live our everyday lives, but we __do__ want a government that is capable and prepared to act to protect the lives and livelihoods of all Americans when crisis hits.
Pete Sessions was in Congress for the last two decades. He did not build that government.
We can't let him back in. That's why we need to run a robust campaign that reaches hundreds of thousands of people. That's why I need your help today. [**If our grassroots team to steps up, we'll have what we need to beat Pete.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17330844/190566059/-704092404?refcode=RKC_043020_em_fr_all_eom6_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjYzNGFhNS0zNThiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trFyet3kB-jJyOgK-PmSj4TFVHBUxpxmNY_t_SIbBlg=)

body:
I’m reaching out one last time before midnight because of how important this deadline is to our campaign, friend.

Right now we’re running the first TV ad of any Senate candidate that directly calls out Trump, Kemp, McConnell and Perdue for their incompetence in a time of crisis.

We’re rapidly bringing grassroots activists, elected officials, and progressive organizations into our campaign for Georgia. Last night, we found out just how scared David Perdue is about our race, with CNN reporting on a private warning he made to conservative activists that “Georgia is in play.”

We have a shot at flipping both U.S. Senate seats in Georgia and swinging the Senate’s balance of power away from Mitch McConnell to a Democratic majority. That would overwhelm Trump’s campaign and end his hope for reelection, but we need to double down right now in order to make it happen.

So before midnight, can I count on you to make a donation? We need to raise $1,712 in the next few hours. Chip in any amount using this link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/invisible-senator?refcode=em043020-pm&refcode2=09f50e95-3a8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true

—Teresa
PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Contributions or gifts to Teresa Tomlinson for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WWVhkapV1EmtIwGkR1tXrw2] . If you would like to unsubscribe, click here [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fe913e74-138b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/09f50e95-3a8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY1MGU5NS0zYThiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uk2RN0iHtFO2r1mCxZNvsr6ACsEgo0EjQRg-EV9LUBY=&id=100930058&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com] . Thanks for your support!

body:
Team, My finance director, Nolan, just gave me the final update on our important monthly fundraising goal, and it looks like we’re still $963 short. I wanted to reach out to you one final time to see if you could help us close the gap before midnight tonight.
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Team,

My finance director, Nolan, just gave me the final update on our important monthly fundraising goal, and it looks like **we’re still $963 short**. I wanted to reach out to you one final time to see if you could help us close the gap before midnight tonight.

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeq22020?refcode=AprilDeadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17331368/190579073/460726911?refcode=em_fr_2020.04.30_b2_en2_all-nd&refcode2=14c17c00-3b8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd &&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxN2MwMC0zYjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87m87z85w3dk8OSiefpUiRCemiWZlpn7RtBvsgJTAJI=) **

**But I know this grassroots team has the power and the momentum to fight back and flip this seat blue in November.**

I hope you consider pitching in before midnight tonight. Anything you can contribute makes all the difference in these important fundraising goals.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeq22020?refcode=AprilDeadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17331369/190579074/460726911?refcode=em_fr_2020.04.30_b2_en2_all-nd&refcode2=14c17c00-3b8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd &amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxN2MwMC0zYjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87m87z85w3dk8OSiefpUiRCemiWZlpn7RtBvsgJTAJI=)

I just pulled our final fundraising numbers for today, and it looks like we’re still **$963 short**. With Scott Perry outraising us last quarter, and these Republican special interest groups pouring money into our race, not meeting this goal could put us in a really tough spot down the line.

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Can I count on your support before midnight?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Hey there,

I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy. These are difficult times and I empathize with you. I have been doing most of my job as mayor from home, one Zoom meeting to the next. As mayor, I work with the council and city manager to ensure proper city operations, and it is my priority to make sure families are safe and informed during this pandemic. Today, I am reaching out to you before tonight’s deadline to share a little bit about the state of our race for Congress and why reaching our end-of-month goal is so crucial.

Over the past few weeks, this campaign has really picked up momentum. First, thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we outraised not only the incumbent -- but the entire GOP field combined last quarter. I cannot thank you enough for your words of encouragement and support. Then, the League of Conservation Voters and EMILY's List endorsed our campaign!

I am so incredibly grateful that each of you have joined me in this important and historic race. It's because of your support that we have the momentum to bring compassion, competence and common sense leadership to this congressional seat, but we can't afford to slow down for even a moment.

**[With just a few hours left until our end-of-month deadline, will you step up and chip in $10 or more to push us over the finish line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17331530/190583389/94722860?gpsid=8_122_12632&refcode=em20_200430_eom5_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200430_eom5_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzU0N2E2MC0zZDhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NoRMwQnAeHni7WSLGcjkPgp0OTz2V0Qxg3xMPFMURQw=)**

To me, this race isn't about partisan politics, it's about making sure that your voice, and the voices of all families, are heard. I understand the struggles our families are facing, because I've faced them too -- and I'll fight everyday in Congress on the issues that matter most to Kansans.

This race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, and we still have a tough fight ahead of us. It's crucial we hit this end-of-month goal to ensure we have the resources to take on whatever comes our way.

**[Friend, I can't flip this seat without your support. Can you chip in before midnight tonight to help us hit our end-of-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17331531/190583390/94722860?gpsid=8_122_12632&refcode=em20_200430_eom5_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200430_eom5_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzU0N2E2MC0zZDhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NoRMwQnAeHni7WSLGcjkPgp0OTz2V0Qxg3xMPFMURQw=)**

Thanks,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17331532/190583391/94722860?gpsid=8_122_12632&refcode=em20_200430_eom5_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200430_eom5_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzU0N2E2MC0zZDhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NoRMwQnAeHni7WSLGcjkPgp0OTz2V0Qxg3xMPFMURQw=)

clean_body: Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team. Hey there, I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy. These are difficult times and I empathize with you. I have been doing most of my job as mayor from home, one Zoom meeting to the next. As mayor, I work with the council and city manager to ensure proper city operations, and it is my priority to make sure families are safe and informed during this pandemic. Today, I am reaching out to you before tonight’s deadline to share a little bit about the state of our race for Congress and why reaching our end-of-month goal is so crucial. Over the past few weeks, this campaign has really picked up momentum. First, thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we outraised not only the incumbent -- but the entire GOP field combined last quarter. I cannot thank you enough for your words of encouragement and support. Then, the League of Conservation Voters and EMILY's List endorsed our campaign! I am so incredibly grateful that each of you have joined me in this important and historic race. It's because of your support that we have the momentum to bring compassion, competence and common sense leadership to this congressional seat, but we can't afford to slow down for even a moment. = To me, this race isn't about partisan politics, it's about making sure that your voice, and the voices of all families, are heard. I understand the struggles our families are facing, because I've faced them too -- and I'll fight everyday in Congress on the issues that matter most to Kansans. This race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, and we still have a tough fight ahead of us. It's crucial we hit this end-of-month goal to ensure we have the resources to take on whatever comes our way. = Thanks, Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Charles Booker
subject: Sorry to email you so late but I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We don't have much time, so please hear me out.
I know it's late, so I'll keep this short. (But please hear me out.)
There are now only four hours or so left until midnight, so I just wanted to make a final ask before the deadline gets any closer: **[Will you be one of 500 grassroots donors to chip in to my campaign before the end-of-month deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17331619/190584598/1338497800?refcode=em20200430-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM5MWJjNi0zZThiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwvLz4e_g-kVJnp6BoqqNe-9Fgl8S9OYWadvJtF_L6U=)**
I've been blown away at how our movement consistently meets goal after goal after goal. Because when we ask, y’all step up.
You know how important our movement is, and what's at stake here. You know that we can't have another six years of Mitch McConnell, and you know that the only way we're going to kick him out is with a bold, progressive agenda like ours – not with some middle-of-the-road, worn-out Democratic establishment agenda.
Our agenda is big and bold, and as we look towards May, we're going to need a supporter base to match if we want to win.
**[It's going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help us reach our goal; I hope you can be one of them tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17331620/190584599/1338497800?refcode=em20200430-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM5MWJjNi0zZThiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwvLz4e_g-kVJnp6BoqqNe-9Fgl8S9OYWadvJtF_L6U=)**
I'm incredibly grateful for your support. When we beat Mitch McConnell this November, I'll know the only reason I got here was because you stepped up when we needed it the most.
Thanks for all you do,
Charles

subject: Crist is a Rubber Stamp
body:
I am running for Congress because we need more leaders willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/239e099d2dee/crist-is-a-rubber-stamp-1481901?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=36c16e3292&e=bbeef49760 "Donate!")
---
| | Fellow Conservatives,

I am running for Congress because we need more leaders willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi. St. Petersburg deserves better representation than a rubber stamp for her out-of-touch ideology, and a rubber stamp for Pelosi perfectly describes Congressman Charlie Crist!

The liberal website ProPublica compares elected officials to one another and states that Charlie Crist votes with Pelosi 90% of the time! Don’t believe me? Here’s a screenshot...

---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=f9bc397500&e=bbeef49760)
---
| Crist votes with Pelosi 90% of the time! Do you think her San Francisco values represent Florida? I don’t! If you agree with me, please consider making a donation: [www.amandamakki.com/donate](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=c90f791dc4&e=bbeef49760 "Donate! ")

My family and I legally immigrated to the United States to escape the religious and political persecution of Iranian “Supreme Leader” Ayatollah Khamenei.

If you were not the right religion, or didn’t hold their extremist beliefs, you were killed. Being raised in America, my family taught me the value of a good education, hard work, and family.

Instead of fighting terroristic regimes like Iran’s, Charlie Crist supported the Iran Deal, which gave airplanes filled with cash to the same regime that has persecuted our friends and family for being Christian.

I can beat Charlie Crist, but only with your help! Crist and his allies in D.C. and California have almost 3 million dollars ready to spend on television.

Will you donate what you can today? [www.amandamakki.com/donate](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=eb464ed225&e=bbeef49760 "Donate!")

Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District

Amanda Makki for Congress

St. Petersburg, FL 33743

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 4 AM
body:
Each morning, like many Americans, I’m up between 4 and 5 in the morning.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374096-879824-4978593-62e54f671e-ae63c5a57a)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374096-879824-4978592-48b29d9d73-ae63c5a57a) Each morning, like many Americans, I’m up between 4 and 5 in the morning.

I’m so motivated by my mission to win this Congressional seat and oust an obstructionist Democrat, that my energy doesn’t waiver.

Winning is my biggest priority. It’s my only option.

Today is the last day of the month, and I need to raise another $8,000 to hit our fundraising goal.

[Help me win by donating today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374096-879824-4978592-48b29d9d73-ae63c5a57a)

As the _New York Post_ pointed out earlier this month when they covered my race, **my opponent Democrat Lois Frankel is WEAKER than AOC’s challenger that she knocked out in 2018**.

We can win this, and it comes down to being able to reach as many voters as we can. [Pitch in today and get me to Washington.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374096-879824-4978592-48b29d9d73-ae63c5a57a)

While I HATE being compared to AOC, none of us can deny the influence she has had in the Democrat Party. She’s steered the agenda from her idiotic “New Green Deal” to impeachment . . . as a freshman!

And I’ll tell you now, I won’t be proposing or voting for any new ridiculous spending packages. I won’t be hyper-focused on partisanship.

What will I do?

* I’ll be CHARGING at any organizations that are trying to control our freedom and our speech! **Facebook, Twitter and Google know this is coming – and that’s why they’re trying everything to stop me.**

* I won’t be recording myself dancing in the halls of Congress, I’ll be in the face of obstructionist Democrats, recording myself confronting their socialist agenda.

* I will defend our military, I will defend our allies and Israel, and I’m going to protect the health and welfare of our Seniors.

That ONLY happens when I win. [And I can only win with your ongoing and very generous support.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374096-879824-4978592-48b29d9d73-ae63c5a57a)

[**Donate before midnight tonight to help us crush our April fundraising goal.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374096-879824-4978592-48b29d9d73-ae63c5a57a)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-374096-879824-84585d41bbe610b-ae63c5a57a)

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
I hate to interrupt your evening, but I promised my team I would make one last ask before the night is up.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ial7LyEekm0PaVWDGY6LKUTMjRHGSf7CfRN5ibOO6es=/MJ_Uv9hTSHEHArmuLGmT0S4SP7-uessQCMSI3kgucX0=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.30_SPK_b2_all&amount=15)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ial7LyEekm0PaVWDGY6LKUTMjRHGSf7CfRN5ibOO6es=/CF3z-XBRZdnlL_PW_47W3qq0jU2TFKCaB6fvW89IsO0=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

I hate to interrupt your evening, but I promised my team I would make one last ask before the night is up.

We're only $930 away from meeting our April goal, and while it may not seem like a lot, it makes a huge difference to a scrappy campaign like ours. Unlike one of my Republican opponents, our campaign doesn't have the ability to write itself big personal checks, and our motto of "True Leadership" means fighting _against_ DC special interests -- not caving to them.

I know times are tough, but if you're in a position to donate tonight, we would really appreciate your help.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ial7LyEekm0PaVWDGY6LKUTMjRHGSf7CfRN5ibOO6es=/MJ_Uv9hTSHEHArmuLGmT0S4SP7-uessQCMSI3kgucX0=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.30_SPK_b2_all&amount=15)

Thank you,
Sri

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ial7LyEekm0PaVWDGY6LKUTMjRHGSf7CfRN5ibOO6es=/MJ_Uv9hTSHEHArmuLGmT0S4SP7-uessQCMSI3kgucX0=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.30_SPK_b2_all&amount=15)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ial7LyEekm0PaVWDGY6LKUTMjRHGSf7CfRN5ibOO6es=/MJ_Uv9hTSHEHArmuLGmT0S4SP7-uessQCMSI3kgucX0=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.30_SPK_b2_all&amount=15)

clean_body: I hate to interrupt your evening, but I promised my team I would make one last ask before the night is up. | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our = to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Team - I hate to interrupt your evening, but I promised my team I would make one last ask before the night is up. We're only $930 away from meeting our April goal, and while it may not seem like a lot, it makes a huge difference to a scrappy campaign like ours. Unlike one of my Republican opponents, our campaign doesn't have the ability to write itself big personal checks, and our motto of "True Leadership" means fighting against DC special interests -- not caving to them. I know times are tough, but if you're in a position to donate tonight, we would really appreciate your help. Thank you, Sri | Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at = | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Willie Nelson & Family, Ryan Bingham, and Trae the Truth have important messages for you:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

We’re
reaching out now because it’s almost the end of the month, and food banks
are budgeting ahead for even more skyrocketing demands for food due to
COVID-19.

We’re aiming to raise $13,000 today for food banks in Texas. Some have
been fortunate in the donations they’ve received – others less so. We need
to help all of them. If everyone reading this right now chipped in just
$3, we would surge past our goal.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42456?refcode=ema20200430-87376&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=87376%2E444211%2EJ2QcZ- ]Can you support the food banks that need the most help right now by
splitting a donation – before today is up? If you can afford it, we need
you on board.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42456?refcode=ema20200430-87376&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=87376%2E444211%2EJ2QcZ- ]Contribute to food banks

Because the need is so urgent, we reached out to some of our friends with
large social media audiences to record video messages asking folks to join
Powered by People in helping food banks.

Here are a few messages from them to you:

Willie Nelson & Family: In this age of the novel coronavirus, we must all
do what we can. If you’re lucky enough to be able to donate, please do
because no one in our human family should be food insecure. Please stay
safe and COVID-free.

Ryan Bingham: I hope you’re staying safe, healthy, and happy out there.
People all over Texas are hungry and dependent on food banks during this
difficult time. Unfortunately, there’s a shortage as thousands more
families resort to food banks to stay fed every day. Please consider
lending a hand to help out your fellow Texans.

Trae the Truth: I want to take the time to send prayers, blessings, and
love to everybody that’s been affected by the coronavirus. A special
salute to all the front liners and essential workers. We rockin’ with
you... There are so many people that are out trying to get food and other
things for their families, but there’s not enough manpower to help them.
If you’re able to help, it’s always good for us to come together as one.
And if not, make sure you stay in, stay safe. One love.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42456?refcode=ema20200430-87376&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=87376%2E444211%2EJ2QcZ- ]Like Willie Nelson & Family said: if you’re lucky enough to be able to

clean_body: [1]Powered By People We’re reaching out now because it’s almost the end of the month, and food banks are budgeting ahead for even more skyrocketing demands for food due to COVID-19. We’re aiming to raise $13,000 today for food banks in Texas. Some have been fortunate in the donations they’ve received – others less so. We need to help all of them. If everyone reading this right now chipped in just $3, we would surge past our goal. [ - ]Can you support the food banks that need the most help right now by splitting a donation – before today is up? If you can afford it, we need you on board. [ - ]Contribute to food banks Because the need is so urgent, we reached out to some of our friends with large social media audiences to record video messages asking folks to join Powered by People in helping food banks. Here are a few messages from them to you: Willie Nelson & Family: In this age of the novel coronavirus, we must all do what we can. If you’re lucky enough to be able to donate, please do because no one in our human family should be food insecure. Please stay safe and COVID-free. Ryan Bingham: I hope you’re staying safe, healthy, and happy out there. People all over Texas are hungry and dependent on food banks during this difficult time. Unfortunately, there’s a shortage as thousands more families resort to food banks to stay fed every day. Please consider lending a hand to help out your fellow Texans. Trae the Truth: I want to take the time to send prayers, blessings, and love to everybody that’s been affected by the coronavirus. A special salute to all the front liners and essential workers. We rockin’ with you... There are so many people that are out trying to get food and other things for their families, but there’s not enough manpower to help them. If you’re able to help, it’s always good for us to come together as one. And if not, make sure you stay in, stay safe. One love. [ - ]Like Willie Nelson & Family said: if you’re lucky enough to be able to donate, please do because no one in our human family should be food insecure. People are counting on us. Together, we can meet our goal quickly. We hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy. Thanks for all you do. – Powered by People [ - ]Contribute to food banks

name: Abby Roesch
subject: Quick Update: April Deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC
body:
Hey there! I wanted to send a quick update on our end-of-month fundraising progress:

Hey there!

I wanted to send a quick update on our end-of-month fundraising progress: We are more than halfway through the last day of the month, but we haven't yet hit our goal.

If everyone who hasn't yet donated during our end-of-month push chips in $10 right now, we'll be able to get back on track. But we know that not everyone can, and that's why we're counting on **you**.

You can donate here: [**https://secure.winred.com/david-hill-for-oklahoma/april-midnight-deadline**](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=9d57414d297d4ee19eb7ce318dd3fa89&_e=cM_kIrzZrr_ho1Sw5zWNn09Y4SQcSrigSYvJC45885YlPtjiNfcaeuCifjpRZYiDHWBmNFqK12ZKPb0zgX6htwwqozpkbxcw6VJMWbiB0W8Kqi8ycj-ya-OaRbWWhsgx6I0Im8jKvifcOdbyAFNe1QuHFbwyJ0r_rbyspnodq9gKIN3LgFUpzL5Mku0HnbJBmu5FWYJIOFDVJAyCxzzgV64R9HKbulvI9z1RAIUyfGxksDBc8BoT65nFQ69Xd84KivvTfbhIyH6uP6__JmTmnHS4Zc_5p4SAL6eSK1GJNV4wVCPJdrbYelFVQwA3qak9YdJXATOazx1BUS-hGGnpki4APIE4cf6za262PQ2FXAsESj4e1qwd0B-P5dj2Ls2itEGU1e6WoRMkQUcEhcI2PJ8LB28aKNRYnBbY4np3y5A%3D)

Achieving this fundraising this goal is _**crucial**_ for David's success. Defeating Democrat Kendra Horn at the ballot box in November depends upon your support today.

We know this is a hard time for so many individuals across our country. So if you can, but only if you can, please make a donation for our end-of-month fundraising push before midnight tonight — every donation, no matter how small, adds up and makes a huge difference in the end.

Thank you for all your support in every way you show it. With your help, we will bring common sense to Washington, D.C.

Thanks again,

Abby Roesch
Campaign Manager
David Hill for Congress

PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC
---
If you would like to be removed from this list, please notify us [here](http://http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_s=9d57414d297d4ee19eb7ce318dd3fa89&_t=FbF0DELA1qEeDwXePJ0cqqn5slXPcSKNOycO73E87qdullGTvdNqHy2Hd4l_jPodHPgB_zH64-_0aPqD80nRQ5eKvSQ6vzwgOe-wzCR66T_QiiYlbJ_EyP9_XIZdBsjhiGGHtPGbMs16yOEViIvyaML-8TeXXV-t7_qA_mcYew0%3D).
