name: Team Kennedy
subject: Asking for 3 minutes of your time to read this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56ef/166477099/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey, a bit of a different email today. We haven't talked politics in a while but want to reach out about two things. **First, we want to make an important distinction about this Senate race.[ Then, we want to ask you to pitch in $3 to recommit to our fight.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56e8/166477099/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-04-30-whyjoerecap&recurring=0&amount=3")** **This is a long email, but we'd be grateful if you took a few moments to read.**
* * *
Over the past month, the Senate race in Massachusetts has changed. Our world has been turned upside down. Our priorities and perspectives have shifted. And the question of leadership has taken on new meaning and new urgency. We have seen leaders fall horribly short - our President chief among them. But we've also seen leaders rise to the challenge. And without a doubt, Joe has met this moment. He has shown up for the communities and families that have gone underserved and under-protected for generations. He has shown up for those most in need. He has shown up for all of us. Every moment of his has been filled making phone calls, tracking down PPE for our frontlines. Holding live streams on social media bringing the stories of those impacted into the public eye. Raising tens of thousands of dollars for charities. Directing his volunteer network to check on vulnerable residents rather than push his own campaign. The last few days he has been making stops across Massachusetts (with PPE on and social distancing intact!) to hand-deliver food to hospitals, delivery workers, and others on the frontlines. **Because that has what he has done his entire career: show up. Where the need is greatest, where the hurt hits hardest, where others haven't.** Senator Markey's reputation and record are different. He isn't here enough. He isn't in _Massachusetts_ __ enough. And we can't afford absent leadership right now. **We need better than the status quo. We need leadership in a Senator who will be on the ground - fighting by our side - as we recover and rebuild. ** [**So, we're asking, If you are financially able, could you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign? With your help, we can win our primary on September 1, and give Massachusetts the leadership it needs in the U.S. Senate during a time of unprecedented crisis.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56e8/166477099/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-04-30-whyjoerecap&recurring=0&amount=3") We know how difficult these times are, and we know a donation may be out of the question for many. That's ok, and from the bottom of our hearts, we are grateful for the support, energy, attention, and love that you give this campaign every day. But we are asking because we believe this fight has taken on a new urgency. Our path ahead is long and hard. Massachusetts is going to need the very best representation at every level of government to get through this. We need someone who will show up on the frontlines. Someone who will fight in the trenches _with us._ Someone who will listen. And someone who will lead. Joe has made it clear he's up for the challenge. So let's give Massachusetts the leadership we deserve. Team Kennedy [Pitch in $3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56e8/166477099/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-04-30-whyjoerecap&recurring=0&amount=3") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56e9/166477099/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56ea/166477099/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56eb/166477099/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56f4/166477099/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56f5/166477099/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; [click here to change your email address](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56f6/166477099/VEsHBQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/update-address/"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56f7/166477099/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639064d/55b66746/2079af60/80e56f0/166477099/VEsHBw/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

Holding live streams on social media bringing the stories of those impacted into the public eye. Raising tens of thousands of dollars for charities. Directing his volunteer network to check on vulnerable residents rather than push his own campaign. The last few days he has been making stops across Massachusetts (with PPE on and social distancing intact!) to hand-deliver food to hospitals, delivery workers, and others on the frontlines. Because that has what he has done his entire career: show up. Where the need is greatest, where the hurt hits hardest, where others haven't. Senator Markey's reputation and record are different. He isn't here enough. He isn't in Massachusetts enough. And we can't afford absent leadership right now. We need better than the status quo. We need leadership in a Senator who will be on the ground - fighting by our side - as we recover and rebuild. "" We know how difficult these times are, and we know a donation may be out of the question for many. That's ok, and from the bottom of our hearts, we are grateful for the support, energy, attention, and love that you give this campaign every day. But we are asking because we believe this fight has taken on a new urgency. Our path ahead is long and hard. Massachusetts is going to need the very best representation at every level of government to get through this. We need someone who will show up on the frontlines. Someone who will fight in the trenches with us._ Someone who will listen. And someone who will lead. Joe has made it clear he's up for the challenge. So let's give Massachusetts the leadership we deserve. Team Kennedy "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by ""**. PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. "" "" "" Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? "". This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; "". If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, "" Questions or concerns? "". |

body:
|
#

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I wouldn't have it any other way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first contribution to Warren Democrats before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline. But first, I wanted to explain why your contribution would be so | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525705/45c30650/1ca111d8a/66e93027/2661931333/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first contribution to Warren Democrats before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline. But first, I wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now:

We've set an ambitious April fundraising goal to kick off our robust organizing plan that will hold the Trump administration accountable and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

And whether or not we reach this goal depends only on the number of grassroots supporters who chip in before tonight's deadline. Because we're 100% grassroots-funded and I wouldn't have it any other way.

It's a big goal. But our grassroots team has powered this movement further than anyone could have imagined. And with supporters like you by my side, I know we can reach it together.

**[I'm only asking because your continued support right now would be powerfully important: If you're in a place to donate today, will you chip in $2 or whatever you can to help grow our movement and hit our goal before tonight's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525705/45c30650/1ca111d8a/66e93026/2661931333/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyOEZfRU9NX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwNDMwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ28F_EOM_EWD_E_20200430_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525705/45c30650/1ca111d8a/66e93026/2661931333/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyOEZfRU9NX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwNDMwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ28F_EOM_EWD_E_20200430_V1S1_P")

name: Susan (iPhone)
subject: In order to stand a chance against the Far Left's attacks, we must raise more before my April deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for SenatorP
body:
There are only hours left before Susan’s April deadline. And we are still $24,550 short of reaching our goal. We MUST catch up!We can promise you that Susan’s opponent is not short of her goals this month. In the last quarter, her campaign outraised us by MILLIONS of dollars. This does not even take into account the tens of millions being spent by Far Left groups that are spreading lies about Susan.To unsubscribe click here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTc1OTES1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDAwNDM1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter -- There are only hours left before my April deadline at midnight... and my campaign has still not reached our goal.

The amount of outside money flowing into Maine to defeat me has been unprecedented and unimaginable. They are flooding Maine’s airwaves with false attacks against my character and lies about my record. In order to fight back and come out on top in November, we must raise more money -- it is that simple.

The difference between winning and losing comes down to my end-of-month goals. How my campaign performs this month will determine our momentum for all of Quarter 2. That is why I am asking you this: If you can afford it right now, could you please contribute just $5, $10, or $25 to my campaign before my April deadline at midnight? Every dollar you give makes my campaign that much more equipped to fight back against the Left’s ruthless attacks. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTc1OTES1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDAwNDM1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 I need you in this fight.

Thank you. Your support means everything to me.

Susan
Sent from my iPhone

name: =?utf-8?Q?Trey=2C=20Makki=20for=20Congress?=
subject: FW: Crist is a Rubber Stamp
body:
I'm Amanda's campaign manager and wanted to follow-up from Amanda's last email. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9592e08b63db/crist-is-a-rubber-stamp-1481925?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | Good afternoon,

I’m Amanda’s campaign manager and I can tell you that we’re seeing some great momentum for our campaign! Besides being endorsed by the GOP leadership, Kevin McCarthy and Steve Scalise, she is winning the support of local elected officials all across our district.

Charlie Crist has been in office for too long. He is the quintessential career politician, willing to say and do anything to win an election. With your help, we can finally end Charlie Crist’s political career! Donate here: [www.amandamakki.com/donate](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=f393b59ac3&e=bbeef49760)

ICYMI I wanted to forward Amanda’s email from earlier today.

Have a great day,
Trey Sent from my iPhone

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Amanda Makki**
Date: Thu, Apr 30, 2020
Subject: Crist is a Rubber Stamp
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=70fd537794&e=bbeef49760 "Donate!")
---
| | Fellow Conservatives,

I am running for Congress because we need more leaders willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi. St. Petersburg deserves better representation than a rubber stamp for her out-of-touch ideology, and a rubber stamp for Pelosi perfectly describes Congressman Charlie Crist!

The liberal website ProPublica compares elected officials to one another and states that Charlie Crist votes with Pelosi 90% of the time! Don’t believe me? Here’s a screenshot...

---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=dd782c7dd1&e=bbeef49760)
---
| Crist votes with Pelosi 90% of the time! Do you think her San Francisco values represent Florida? I don’t! If you agree with me, please consider making a donation: [www.amandamakki.com/donate](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=823e3980b1&e=bbeef49760 "Donate! ")

My family and I legally immigrated to the United States to escape the religious and political persecution of Iranian “Supreme Leader” Ayatollah Khamenei.

If you were not the right religion, or didn’t hold their extremist beliefs, you were killed. Being raised in America, my family taught me the value of a good education, hard work, and family.

Instead of fighting terroristic regimes like Iran’s, Charlie Crist supported the Iran Deal, which gave airplanes filled with cash to the same regime that has persecuted our friends and family for being Christian.

I can beat Charlie Crist, but only with your help! Crist and his allies in D.C. and California have almost 3 million dollars ready to spend on television.

Will you donate what you can today? [www.amandamakki.com/donate](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=49dde5552c&e=bbeef49760 "Donate!")
---
| Thanks for your support,

Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District

For Online Contributions: www.amandamakki.com
For Contributions via Mail, please send to:
Amanda Makki for Congress
PO Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743
---
| |
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/about?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=e545279827&e=bbeef49760&c=8b69051adc) [unsubscribe from this list](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=e545279827&e=bbeef49760&c=8b69051adc) [update subscription preferences](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=e545279827&e=bbeef49760)
Amanda Makki for Congress * 7020 Mango Ave S * St Petersburg, FL 33707-2024 * USA

April is quickly drawing to a close, and we only have a few HOURS left until this month is gone, drawing us a few weeks out from Pennylsvania’s new primary election date.
While these have been some challenging months for our community and our nation as a whole, it’s been encouraging to see how many people across the Lehigh Valley are excited about Lisa’s ideas and her commitment to bring our conservative values to Washington, D.C.

name: Christy Smith
subject: We're almost out of time before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. I just checked with my finance team, and we're coming up short of where we need to be.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We're almost out of time before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. I just checked with my finance team, **and we're coming up short of where we need to be.**

So much is on the line in this race. Every day, Donald Trump puts more and more Americans in harm's way in response to the coronavirus pandemic.

This race is a referendum on Trump's handling of this crisis. Special interest groups and staunch supporters of him are trying to pump enough money into this race to win -- **but with your help, we won't let it happen.**

**[We can win this race, but only if our grassroots supporters step up right now as we enter the final few days before our election. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Behind President Trump’s action to protect America’s food supply
body:
President Trump is using the Defense Production Act to ensure that Americans have a reliable supply of beef, pork, and poultry during... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b2bf099d0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 30, 2020
---
| | |
# **Behind President Trump’s action to protect America’s food supply**

**President Trump** is using the Defense Production Act to ensure that Americans have a reliable supply of beef, pork, and poultry during the global Coronavirus pandemic.

**Food supply** is critical infrastructure, essential to the health and safety of every American citizen. Recent actions in some states have led to the complete closure of large processing facilities, which can quickly affect meat availability in all parts of the country.

🎬 [Secretary Perdue: Americans can be confident there will be food on the table](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea6ac9918d&e=3ee4985eea)

**The closure of a single plant** can eliminate more than 80 percent of the supply of a particular meat—say, ground beef—for an entire grocery store chain. All told, the failure to keep facilities open could force millions of pounds of meat to disappear from the market, potentially causing long-term disruptions to America’s supply chain.

**With President Trump’s** [executive order](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=717931c976&e=3ee4985eea) this week, the Department of Agriculture can ensure U.S. meat and poultry processors continue to operate uninterrupted to the maximum extent possible. To protect worker safety, processors will continue to follow the latest guidance from the CDC and the Occupational Safety & Health Administration.

**“The United States** of America is undergoing the fastest industrial mobilization since World War II,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro says. The President's use of “the Defense Production Act is a key part of that mobilization.”

**🎬** [Peter Navarro: Fastest industrial mobilization since WWII!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=104e97eb05&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **Secretary Perdue:** [Farmers know President Trump is looking out for them](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3db596eb19&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: Help in ‘our darkest hour of need’**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c9e3cc1c1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** met with New Jersey Gov. Phil Murphy (D) in the Oval Office today, discussing the state’s Coronavirus response and its plans for a great economic comeback.

**“I thank you** for the enormous help in our darkest hour of need,” Gov. Murphy told the President.

**“Ventilators** , as you can see, PPE [personal protective equipment], testing sites—now I think we’re going to be in a very good place, thanks to you and your team.”

**New Jersey** has faced the second-largest number of Coronavirus cases in the country behind New York. President Trump praised Gov. Murphy for doing a “terrific job” handling the crisis in partnership with FEMA and others across the federal government.

**“A big part** of our ability to reopen as fast as we all want to is to rapidly expand testing and you all literally, in the here and now this week, are helping us in a big way,” Gov. Murphy said.

[READ: Gov. Murphy Praises Trump’s Coronavirus Response During Oval Office Visit](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad9243b031&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

clean_body: President Trump is using the Defense Production Act to ensure that Americans have a reliable supply of beef, pork, and poultry during... | | | | | The White House • April 30, 2020 | | | Behind President Trump’s action to protect America’s food supply President Trump is using the Defense Production Act to ensure that Americans have a reliable supply of beef, pork, and poultry during the global Coronavirus pandemic. Food supply is critical infrastructure, essential to the health and safety of every American citizen. Recent actions in some states have led to the complete closure of large processing facilities, which can quickly affect meat availability in all parts of the country. 🎬 The closure of a single plant can eliminate more than 80 percent of the supply of a particular meat—say, ground beef—for an entire grocery store chain. All told, the failure to keep facilities open could force millions of pounds of meat to disappear from the market, potentially causing long-term disruptions to America’s supply chain. With President Trump’s this week, the Department of Agriculture can ensure U.S. meat and poultry processors continue to operate uninterrupted to the maximum extent possible. To protect worker safety, processors will continue to follow the latest guidance from the CDC and the Occupational Safety & Health Administration. “The United States of America is undergoing the fastest industrial mobilization since World War II,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro says. The President's use of “the Defense Production Act is a key part of that mobilization.” 🎬 🎬 Secretary Perdue: | | WATCH: Help in ‘our darkest hour of need’ | | President Trump met with New Jersey Gov. Phil Murphy (D) in the Oval Office today, discussing the state’s Coronavirus response and its plans for a great economic comeback. “I thank you for the enormous help in our darkest hour of need,” Gov. Murphy told the President. “Ventilators , as you can see, PPE [personal protective equipment], testing sites—now I think we’re going to be in a very good place, thanks to you and your team.” New Jersey has faced the second-largest number of Coronavirus cases in the country behind New York. President Trump praised Gov. Murphy for doing a “terrific job” handling the crisis in partnership with FEMA and others across the federal government. “A big part of our ability to reopen as fast as we all want to is to rapidly expand testing and you all literally, in the here and now this week, are helping us in a big way,” Gov. Murphy said. | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump meets with New Jersey Governor Phil Murphy | April 30, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: What’s making Gov. Holcomb smile (behind his mask)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb joined Vice President Mike Pence to see firsthand the extraordinary work that Hoosiers are leading in Kokomo. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=847fb81352874075882209a7d0e012bc&_e=cA2-8N6ldkt-zz6qDe1_WvSw94j_1KpS9RDZyMax-ZboDRiu1bGQywLDTyAgjmlnXjenNd9Dizim9AfHGdI5M8qyfs4Vna-DCle6Cu2gOIAx_PjjRrgXamE5TxwnOwCPZlgg5sovUkLEINArM0mXdNzYhRTlgW1bZZXryfd15W0l5ZQg1hAH8HbNji02qUrU97FFFaIIIMEzPI72Bs_YVBa0rHbKAgHeORibts-I2q9udubwYt5F5b5Oat3hVHprzyY199fIaNQcRBXFuoaaJHbBMHjvcRDa7iSzqoV66S2kaeP3DCg1RnAm9adv77YA8zhJulFl6Tw5iILkmHCmWqbeWIqBQGdDX15gV9CgU6c6wWmylOXpnhFvjHNPEdkFHN15m0AMWYPqKo-yKTBI5RGMYy9X9RYrlb72x8BzuZw%3D) |
---|---|---
Friends,

_**“I’ve always been a proud Hoosier, but even today on the tour behind a mask you could probably detect that I was smiling ear to ear.” – Governor Holcomb**_

Today, Governor Holcomb joined Vice President Mike Pence to see firsthand the extraordinary work that Hoosiers are leading in Kokomo. It’s truly a great American (and Hoosier!) story of overcoming seemingly insurmountable barriers to achieve the impossible.

**In just 17 days, American auto giant General Motors and medical device company Ventec Life Systems have come together with a plant right here in Indiana to produce not automobiles, but life-saving ventilators.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=847fb81352874075882209a7d0e012bc&_e=cA2-8N6ldkt-zz6qDe1_WvSw94j_1KpS9RDZyMax-ZboDRiu1bGQywLDTyAgjmlnXjenNd9Dizim9AfHGdI5M8qyfs4Vna-DCle6Cu2gOIAx_PjjRrgXamE5TxwnOwCPZlgg5sovUkLEINArM0mXdNzYhRTlgW1bZZXryfd15W0l5ZQg1hAH8HbNji02qUrUqISncEqQwgNSKUHbhOeuVvXXu_Dg5alLm-KRXB8-F-GDMeTxZ8P0iFvUcCK2DisgKLTZNwD15JsdzlVqvd3Yd0S5xHFadsYyhwhtJsboo3E2AMl21XVoDPBf5rhNqHz9MwC9mAwlvZWtOHLhrstIrvL285ooQGjjv9_P7nD7PY7GYT3w8os3VQPKLMhu1DeJABJ7k5zfke05bt8rE8dqjrWeqWgyWWTD1thspIbah_c%3D)
[ **Watch What Gov. Holcomb Said About These Hoosier Heroes** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=847fb81352874075882209a7d0e012bc&_e=cA2-8N6ldkt-zz6qDe1_WvSw94j_1KpS9RDZyMax-ZboDRiu1bGQywLDTyAgjmlnXjenNd9Dizim9AfHGdI5M8qyfs4Vna-DCle6Cu2gOIAx_PjjRrgXamE5TxwnOwCPZlgg5sovUkLEINArM0mXdNzYhRTlgW1bZZXryfd15W0l5ZQg1hAH8HbNji02qUrUKCJkhDC2zCso90hG01Ur0lh9XXcMpr-8qhzgD57MDzYnRqIRICq5CpUM1ZSLb7uJV0J6bK2cSmUtROP-tsNlagb8a6ZNH3rUo01885jlaxopxyutaJ8Ylrxr-caig3yt19qSPZl6Pnja1sW9k9wFa_yAWpFo1DpvXB5ZeNl3UT13fN3Q8coBvny9W6k0Z_Wsk2smz-t2kms0EyO4sXDpghXhm9DdFIA1-PLkPwRVcbo%3D)
They’ve already produced 600 of these devices that are critical to treat people who are very sick from COVID-19. And they’ll be producing 30,000 ventilators by the end of August.

**As Governor Holcomb said, “It’s almost miraculous, but for the fact that it’s Hoosiers that came running.”**

Along with our doctors, nurses and other medical professions, these Hoosiers are heroes!

And you can be a hero, too. General Motors is _**currently looking to hire more than 1,000 Hoosiers** _in Kokomo to help produce these live-savings ventilators. Interested in joining the cause? **[Register here for a virtual job fair on May 6 at 11 a.m. ET.
](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=847fb81352874075882209a7d0e012bc&_e=cA2-8N6ldkt-zz6qDe1_WmAf94j1djSq5qhjMsrgM35bdWzxVQEpxyvvSoMyyI9U6MiCmTA-mztQP5npBvEMpzBA4ieUNn0RWqif9xsX3qBw6kYcNQCuuKgfvG9w5wa87r06ueJrcpq0BLAZ8XZng_V-iEu157ZjFFx7woxxFPNK32L5DcXo8tgqtZc9ZWHT6ymcCVUKGz4j_wmf7IsmXPhm63TXiD4F4NDVXnuMZ8U4K2CiOQ3MOu6oF5iDqHcGBmb3uw9UzEkumUsUK_ERJ6WtqmWdPR-n7NCK6godLUxrnSA05TtigHNLYwnAFpHRQSMqqVEgUZGek-CcVisABEcJJA4knUDxSapTNYbiAO8j-tqAqse-PgsE6dfnr0IhMck4g0KY7iJJRHHOnilIEm9JPVnawyYVvdkywjsD9Gw%3D)**

America is waging a battle against COVID-19, and Indiana’s work is critical to making sure we win.

_**“Standing here in the Hoosier State... I couldn’t be more inspired. And I wanted to say thank you, not just as your vice president, but as a fellow Hoosier.” – Vice President Mike Pence**_

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend: I need your help.

We're only a few hours away from the biggest fundraising deadline of the month, and I just got some bad news from my team: **If donations don 't pick up right away, we're on track to fall short of our goal. **

Make no mistake: Control of the U.S. Senate is on the line in this race. With my Republican opponent spending millions of her personal fortune to buy this seat and strengthen Mitch McConnell's grip on power, the only way we'll be able to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate is with grassroots donations from people like you.
**Friend, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: ****[Will you please give $5 or more right now- every dollar will be doubled - to help make up this shortfall so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e712/288179be/a5eb847/348e93ea/2738928874/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTczLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk173-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
If we fall short, we'll lose the best chance we've got at ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all. Plain and simple.

That's why this deadline is so important. To flip Georgia blue and fight back against every last right-wing attack, we need to close this fundraising gap by midnight tonight. Because trust me, this is a fight we can't afford to lose.
**I'm counting on you to chip in right now,****friend:[Please, if you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, will you give $5 or more - before our critical match opportunity expires - to help us hit our end-of-month goal and flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e712/288179be/a5eb847/348e93ea/2738928874/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTczLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk173-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for standing alongside me in this fight.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e712/288179be/a5eb847/348e93eb/2738928874/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Mark and I are ready to get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Senate goes back into session next week, and Mark Warner and I are ready to roll up our sleeves and work on another bipartisan deal to help Virginians during this uncertain time.
|
---
| | Derek,

The Senate goes back into session next week, and Mark Warner and I are ready to roll up our sleeves and work on another bipartisan deal to help Virginians during this uncertain time.

And right now, it is more important than ever to send a Democratic majority to the Senate this November. **The path to building that majority has got to include re-electing strong Democrats like my friend Mark in November.**

We know that this is a difficult time for many, and I know Mark appreciates everything folks are doing to keep him in the Senate, working for families all across the Commonwealth. **[If you're able to make a donation right now, could you pitch in a few dollars to his re-election campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d2/53d9897e/54fa8a06/1c886d3f/1421418805/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-work?refcode=20200430_f_1_nd__563__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Donations like yours help Mark get his campaign ready to win big in November -- everything from hiring staff to investing in innovative digital organizing work that has become more important than ever before.

If we want a Senate that will truly prioritize working people, we need Democrats calling the shots in the chamber. It's just that simple.

Thank you and stay safe,
Tim Kaine

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d2/53d9897e/54fa8a06/1c886d3e/1421418805/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-work?refcode=20200430_f_1_nd__563__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Congresswoman Katie Porter
subject: I'm furious Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Hi Peter, it's Katie. I've been working around the clock to make sure working Americans get the relief they so badly need. And honestly, I'm furious.
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c6/72412298/4f99901b/61048ef7/960486301/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200430_PorterEOM_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200430_PorterEOM_U1_X1")

| | Hi Peter, it's Katie. I've been working around the clock to make sure working Americans get the relief they so badly need. And honestly, I'm furious.. Hi Peter, it's Katie. I've been working around the clock to make sure working Americans get the relief they so badly need. **And honestly, I 'm furious.** **Republicans are trying to bail out everyone BUT working families** \-- eager to help those at the top but quick to ignore the working class. That's just not how our government should function. In times like these, we need accessible, high quality, affordable healthcare. We need direct payments to the American people. We need relief for struggling small businesses. **We don 't need corporate bailouts -- and we definitely don't need bailouts for Trump hotels.** I refused to back down from advocating for working families in the face of Republican pressure, but that's made me a top target.
